Aęž‰ndaęž‰ tunkuliki wandaęž‰hali paęž‰taęž‰ pukimaęž‰ homaęž‰laęž‰eki (Luku 6ęž‰27-28,32-36)
5.43: Ambaęž‰ laęž‰ wimiki pi opu haleme pitaęž‰ dupa. Tapake paęž‰taęž‰ pukimaęž‰ homolotaęž‰ tunkuliki halitaęž‰ honditi piaęž‰peke leekeme.
5.44: Pate ame IĚ±maęž‰ iki paęž‰taęž‰ la kitolo ekitaęž‰ dupa. Ikaęž‰ aęž‰ndaęž‰ tunkuliki haliweki paęž‰taęž‰ pukimaęž‰ homo make mo iki tanda kiteme wandaęž‰hali epeaenaęž‰ Kodaęž‰ paęž‰taęž‰ yeni peao hapaęž‰peke.
5.45: Kutu pimikaęž‰naęž‰taęž‰ kotaęž‰ ikitaęž‰ ikaęž‰ hepeni halaęž‰ Apaęž‰naęž‰ eiyeke tonu halimikie. Pa ekipeke. Ipikanaęž‰maęž‰ ipikaęž‰ natenaęž‰ paĚ±aĚ±taęž‰ mo hoke wandaęž‰hali epeke wandaęž‰hali paeyao paęž‰taęž‰ mandake piki nate paĚ±aĚ± kone peaasaęž‰me. Koto tupaęž‰ kone mo epeke hau pu haleme wandaęž‰hali hoke hau pu haleme wandaęž‰hali paęž‰taęž‰ ipikanaęž‰maęž‰ lako iki paeyao mandake tupaęž‰ kone anaęž‰naęž‰ halo halaęž‰me.
5.46: Ikanaęž‰maęž‰ mo iki paęž‰taęž‰ pukimaęž‰ homeleme wandaęž‰hali homeke paęž‰taęž‰ aęž‰ndaęž‰ pukimaęž‰ homemekaęž‰naęž‰taęž‰ pa ekipeke Kodaęž‰maęž‰ iki paęž‰taęž‰ epeke yenki kinaęž‰pe. Mo hande dakisi mu halaęž‰ haliwekimaęž‰ kone kutu piki hau pu halememe.
5.47: Ikaęž‰ taęž‰maęž‰ni paęž‰taęž‰manu homeke mo taęž‰naęž‰maęž‰ homaęž‰laęž‰ pimanu lo haemekaęž‰naęž‰taęž‰ kotaęž‰ ikanaęž‰maęž‰ kototaęž‰ otaęž‰ hau pitolomaęž‰me laa hone witelemepe. Diaęž‰me. Mo pi na miki wandaęž‰halimaęž‰ make ikaęž‰ ikaęž‰ kone kutu piki hau pu halememe.
5.48: Ikanaęž‰maęž‰ ikaęž‰ hepeni halaęž‰ Apaęž‰taęž‰ otaęž‰ tondepe wopu pea halaęž‰ tupaęž‰ iki make tondepe pea hao hapaęž‰peke yaęž‰laęž‰me.

6.1: Kodaęž‰naęž‰ pi miniki haleme wandaęž‰halimaęž‰ ikaęž‰ tambaęž‰ minaęž‰laęž‰ haumanu peaęž‰pekeeki wandaęž‰halimaęž‰ handenaęž‰ handaenaęž‰ tupaęž‰ puluekemaęž‰ hone otaęž‰ na wiki yopu kone peaęž‰paęž‰peke. Pa ekipeke. Wandaęž‰halimaęž‰ handenaęž‰yeke handaenaęž‰ hau pimikaęž‰naęž‰taęž‰ kotaęž‰ mo nakaęž‰ hepeni halaęž‰ Apaęž‰maęž‰ kiaęž‰kaęž‰naęž‰ mulu peleme epeke yenkitaęž‰ homeke siki aęž‰ndaęž‰ make otaęž‰ na milimikie.
6.2: Koto ekinaęž‰taęž‰ mo hande natehali wandaęž‰hali tambaęž‰ muluekemaęž‰ alaęž‰taęž‰ maęž‰ndaęž‰ halemekaęž‰naęž‰taęž‰ kotaęž‰ walaęž‰ walaęž‰ pea na halaęž‰paęž‰peke. Mo hande yayapiki hau pu haleme haliwekimaęž‰ oni hande potaęž‰ hopiki ninaęž‰ make yeni da paęž‰taęž‰manu make kutu piki walaęž‰ walaęž‰ piki haumanu pu halememe. Koto hau pimiki ekitaęž‰ mo wandaęž‰halimaęž‰ ikaęž‰ biki daeyaenaęž‰ yeke pu halememe. IĚ±maęž‰ iki paęž‰taęž‰ otaęž‰ pi alome. Koto tapakemaęž‰ ikaęž‰ pimi haunaęž‰ yenki manutaęž‰ ame do hataęž‰ mu paeyaasememe.
6.3: Mo natehali wandaęž‰hali tambaęž‰ mimikaęž‰naęž‰taęž‰ kotaęž‰ mo ikaęž‰ otaęž‰ teke paęž‰taęž‰ eki sikimaęž‰ kone otaęž‰ na handenaęž‰ leke halaęž‰paęž‰peke.
6.4: Kutu pimikaęž‰naęž‰taęž‰ ikaęž‰ mone honemaęž‰ aęž‰mbao hataęž‰ halaęž‰paęž‰peke alee. Kutaa make mo ikaęž‰ mone honemaęž‰ piteme hau handaęž‰laęž‰ Apaęž‰maęž‰taęž‰ ikaęž‰ epeke yenki kilieke. Yeni pitaęž‰laęž‰ ekinaęž‰ manaęž‰ pimanu waleekeeki (Luku 11ęž‰2-4)
6.5: Yeni pimikaęž‰naęž‰taęž‰ mo hande yayapiki hau pu haleme haliwekinaęž‰ hau na hondaęž‰paęž‰peke. Wandaęž‰halimaęž‰ iki handenaęž‰ hone hone witolo hataęž‰ mandane potaęž‰ hopiki ninaęž‰ make yeni da paęž‰taęž‰manu make tialiao hataęž‰ Kodaęž‰ paęž‰taęž‰ yeni pu halememe. IĚ±maęž‰ iki paęž‰taęž‰ otaęž‰ pi alome. Ikanaęž‰maęž‰ ikaęž‰ pimi haunaęž‰ yenki manutaęž‰ ame do hataęž‰ mu paeyaasememe.
6.6: Ikanaęž‰maęž‰ yeni pimikaęž‰naęž‰taęž‰ kotaęž‰ ikaęž‰ da pandaęž‰ paęž‰taęž‰ potaęž‰ pokaęž‰neao pua pitaęž‰ ikaęž‰ lekemaęž‰ handaęž‰peke na yeke Apaęž‰ paęž‰taęž‰ yeni peaęž‰paęž‰peke. Kutu pimikaęž‰naęž‰taęž‰ kotaęž‰ mo ikaęž‰ mone honemaęž‰ piteme hau handaęž‰laęž‰ Apaęž‰maęž‰taęž‰ ikaęž‰ epeke yenki kilieke.
6.7: Ikanaęž‰maęž‰ yeni aęž‰ndaęž‰ pimikaęž‰naęž‰taęž‰ kotaęž‰ mo hande yayapiki kodaęž‰manu paęž‰taęž‰ yeni pu haleme wandaęž‰halimaęž‰ napeke na pitiki pi eleke eleke wopu lo haleme tupaęž‰ yeni na peaęž‰paęž‰peke. Ikaęž‰ honemaęž‰taęž‰ nikaęž‰ yeni hokulu peaomaęž‰kaęž‰naęž‰taęž‰ kotaęž‰ Kodaęž‰maęž‰ opilieke hone witelememe.
6.8: Ikitaęž‰ koto wandaęž‰hali leke na hapaęž‰peke. Ikaęž‰ hone paęž‰laęž‰eki manutaęž‰ ikanaęž‰maęž‰ honke aĚ±iĚ± na leke hamenaęž‰ kone ikaęž‰ Apaęž‰maęž‰ ambaęž‰ handa hone ulaęž‰me.
6.9: Yeni pimikaęž‰naęž‰taęž‰ kotaęž‰ do tupaęž‰ peaęž‰paęž‰peke. Nikaęž‰ hepeni halaęž‰ Apaęž‰o. Nakaęž‰ yako piki bikitaęž‰ otaęž‰ manda wia haenaęž‰e.
6.10: Nakaęž‰ Kilu Tombuao Haleeki do ane opolo epenaęž‰e. Nakaęž‰ hone paęž‰laęž‰eki oli hepeni nane peao haleme tupaęž‰ do kenkenaęž‰ make peawaenae.
6.11: Do ame nolo polomaęž‰ ne anaęž‰naęž‰ kiaęž‰peke.
6.12: Mandane wandaęž‰halimaęž‰ niki paęž‰taęž‰ hoke hau pimi ekimanu nikanaęž‰maęž‰ pa paeyaaso hamono nikaęž‰ hoke hau pumaęž‰ ekimanu make nakanaęž‰maęž‰ koto tupaęž‰ pa paeyawapeke.
6.13: Kaęž‰ndaęž‰piki ekimaęž‰ niki na la handaęž‰peke. Kotoeki na pikitaęž‰ hoke Sadanimaęž‰ niki hoeyaamaęž‰naęž‰maęž‰ nakanaęž‰maęž‰ niki epeke tupaęž‰ handeteke hapeke laa yeni peaęž‰paęž‰peke yaęž‰laęž‰me.
6.14: Kutupa ikanaęž‰maęž‰ mo iki paęž‰taęž‰ hoke hau pimiki wandaęž‰hali ikaęž‰ hoke haumanu pa paeyaemekaęž‰naęž‰taęž‰ kotaęž‰ ikaęž‰ hepeni halaęž‰ Apaęž‰maęž‰ ikaęž‰ pimi hoke haumanu make pa paeyawalieke.
6.15: Pate ikanaęž‰maęž‰ mo iki paęž‰taęž‰ hoke hau pimiki wandaęž‰hali ikaęž‰ hoke hau pa na paeyaemekaęž‰naęž‰taęž‰ kotaęž‰ ikaęž‰ Apaęž‰maęž‰ make mo ikaęž‰ pimi hoke haumanu tonkaęž‰naęž‰ pa na paeyawalieke. Nee pi witaęž‰laęž‰ ekinaęž‰ manaęž‰manu waleekeeki
6.16: Ikanaęž‰maęž‰ nee pi aęž‰ndaęž‰ wimikaęž‰naęž‰taęž‰ kotaęž‰ mo ikaęž‰ puki paęž‰taęž‰ ulaęž‰ haumanu aęž‰mbaaso hataęž‰ mo makeaaso hau piteme haliweki ikaęž‰ hoke wenoko haseme tupaęž‰ na hapaęž‰peke. Mo haliwekimaęž‰taęž‰ wandaęž‰halimaęž‰ handolo hataęž‰ ikitaęž‰ nee pi ulaęž‰ some yaęž‰kaęž‰taęž‰me hone winaęž‰ ikaęž‰ loke handeteke halaęž‰ hau minaęž‰paęž‰latiki pu halememe. IĚ±maęž‰ iki paęž‰taęž‰ otaęž‰ pi alome. Koto haliwekimaęž‰ ikaęž‰ mulumeke hone wilimi aletaęž‰ ame do hataęž‰ mu paeyaasememe.
6.17: Pate ikanaęž‰maęž‰ nee pi aęž‰ndaęž‰ wimikaęž‰naęž‰taęž‰ kotaęž‰ wandaęž‰halimaęž‰ handaęž‰ wiaamaęž‰naęž‰maęž‰
6.18: ikaęž‰ leke popeleke tandaęž‰pa itiki yola hapaęž‰peke. Kutu pimikaęž‰naęž‰taęž‰ kotaęž‰ mo nakaęž‰ handaęž‰peke na yaęž‰laęž‰ Apaęž‰maęž‰ handaa hone wilieke. Kutaa mo nakaęž‰ honumake siki pitele hau handaęž‰laęž‰ Apaęž‰maęž‰taęž‰ nakaęž‰ yenki wialieke. Hepeni paęž‰taęž‰ hamoko hapekeeki (Luku 12ęž‰33-34)
6.19: Mo makaęž‰taęž‰ ikiki pu o bisapu inkikimaęž‰ no o haliwekimaęž‰ pake no kutu pulu peleme kenke paęž‰taęž‰ ikaęž‰ alemanu na amu pikitaęž‰
6.20: pa mo makaęž‰taęž‰ ikiki na pu bisapu inkikimaęž‰ na no make haliwekimaęž‰ pake na mulu peleme Hepeni nane ikaęž‰ alemanu amu piaęž‰paęž‰peke.
6.21: Pa ekipeke. Ikaęž‰ alemanu amu peleme paęž‰taęž‰taęž‰ ikaęž‰ honemanu make mandake winaęž‰ lo halimikie. Lokenaęž‰ paĚ±aĚ± (Luku 11ęž‰34-36)
6.22: Mo leketaęž‰ lokenaęž‰ olaęž‰pakee. Nakaęž‰ leke yaapo telipinaęž‰ epeaęž‰kaęž‰naęž‰taęž‰ kotaęž‰ nakaęž‰ loke paeyaotaęž‰ paĚ±aĚ±maęž‰ tumbilieke.
6.23: Pate nakaęž‰ leke yaapo aęž‰ndaęž‰ hoeyaęž‰kaęž‰naęž‰taęž‰ kotaęž‰ mo nakaęž‰ loke paeyaotaęž‰ timbaęž‰ laęž‰ pambilieke. Koto mo nakaęž‰ lokenaęž‰ paĚ±aĚ± aęž‰ndaęž‰ timbaęž‰ leaęž‰kaęž‰naęž‰taęž‰ aęž‰pee kotaęž‰ kototaęž‰ otaęž‰ timbaęž‰ tiekee. Homeke halimaęž‰ taęž‰taęž‰ piki you hali yaaponaęž‰ hone paęž‰laęž‰ haumanu homeke dinaęž‰ na piaęž‰pekeeki (Luku 16ęž‰13, 12ęž‰22-31)
6.24: Homeke maęž‰ndaęž‰maęž‰ mo you hali yaaponaęž‰ e pokaasaęž‰ hali hapeke na yaęž‰laęž‰me. Puluekemaęž‰ taapo hayaęž‰kaęž‰naęž‰taęž‰ kotaęž‰ maęž‰ndaęž‰ paęž‰taęž‰ pukimaęž‰ homolotaęž‰ maęž‰ndaęž‰taęž‰ honditi pilieke o maęž‰ndaęž‰ paęž‰taęž‰taęž‰ hone wopu pitolo hataęž‰taęž‰ maęž‰ndaęž‰taęž‰ kiaalieke. Kutaa ikanaęž‰maęž‰ make mo mani pitaęž‰ Kodaęž‰ yaapomaęž‰ ikaęž‰ you hali yaapo haenaęž‰ laa ipilikaęž‰ e homeke dinaęž‰ pokaapaęž‰peke na yaęž‰laęž‰me. Wetepe epolo paęž‰laęž‰ haunaęž‰ kaęž‰ndaęž‰maęž‰ na homaęž‰laęž‰eki
6.25: Do ekinaęž‰ yeke iki paęž‰taęž‰ dupa la kitolome. IĚ± homaamaęž‰naęž‰ ikali ne aleke noluaęž‰pe laa make ya yamaęž‰peke ale tonkaęž‰naęž‰ ekipa muluaęž‰pe laa kaęž‰ndaęž‰maęž‰ na homo hapaęž‰peke. Do ekinaęž‰yeke loaęž‰me. Mo ikaęž‰ daęž‰taęž‰laęž‰ ekimaęž‰taęž‰ mo ne na lombei pu make o ikaęž‰ lokemaęž‰taęž‰ mo akaęž‰manu otaęž‰ na lombei paęž‰lekeyeke yekea.
6.26: Mo bitutu laa pomineleme bamanu handaęž‰pe. Ikanaęž‰maęž‰taęž‰ ikaęž‰ nolo peleme ne waemanu nokopa kilikimanu talaataęž‰ mo ne amu pu halaęž‰ da paęž‰taęž‰manu na amu pu halememe. Koto hau na pu halemepate pa mo hepeni halaęž‰ Apaęž‰maęž‰ ikaęž‰ nemanu anaęž‰naęž‰ halo halaęž‰kaęž‰taęž‰me hone umanaęž‰e. Kotaęž‰ iki make mo bamanu otaęž‰ lombei na pelemekeyeke yekea.
6.27: Ikaęž‰ kaęž‰ndaęž‰maęž‰ homo halemeeki manumaęž‰taęž‰ ikaęž‰ halo peleme nate leke hokulu peaapeke yaęž‰laęž‰pe.
6.28: Ikaęž‰ akaęž‰manu ekipa muluepe laa pa ekipeke kaęž‰ndaęž‰maęž‰ homo halemepe. Mo si ale manunaęž‰ momamanu opaęž‰laęž‰eki hone wipee. Koto moma manumaęž‰taęž‰ ikaęž‰ yamaęž‰peke akaęž‰manu muluekemaęž‰ e na poko halememe. Koto hau na pu halemepate
6.29: IĚ±maęž‰ iki paęž‰taęž‰ alotaęž‰ Mo hande Kini Solomonomaęž‰ kone ipikaęž‰ mani tieke tiekemaęž‰ mo moma manunaęž‰ au laęž‰laęž‰ ekimaęž‰ handeke akaęž‰manu na hambo yameekeme alome.
6.30: Mo ame homeke opa haenaęž‰ laa tunkula hapuao beliataęž‰ tinaęž‰ yankaęž‰peke yeke moma manunaęž‰ autaęž‰ Kodaęž‰maęž‰ lawao hayaęž‰kaęž‰naęž‰taęž‰ aęž‰pee kotaęž‰ ikaęž‰ hone tulaaseme ekitaęž‰ otaęž‰ hodikale siki yaęž‰kaęž‰taęž‰me. Koto alemanu paęž‰taęž‰ kone Kodaęž‰maęž‰ kutu pu hayaęž‰kaęž‰naęž‰taęž‰ kotaęž‰ ipikanaęž‰maęž‰ iki make otaęž‰ anaęž‰naęž‰ kone handeteke halieke.
6.31: Kutu piliekemaęž‰ ikanaęž‰maęž‰taęž‰ Ya nolo polo ne ikali make akaęž‰ peaataęž‰ hanemaęž‰ epeaęž‰kaęž‰naęž‰ muluaęž‰pe laa kaęž‰ndaęž‰maęž‰ na homo hapaęž‰peke.
6.32: Mo Kodaęž‰naęž‰ biki na opimiki wandaęž‰halimaęž‰taęž‰ hoto paeyao koto ale manunaęž‰ anke wopu tolu haleme. Pate mo ikaęž‰ hepeni halaęž‰ Apaęž‰maęž‰taęž‰ koto alemanu nate paeyao ikanaęž‰maęž‰ make mu hapaęž‰peke ekitaęž‰ hone ulaęž‰me.
6.33: Koto paęž‰laęž‰ ekinaęž‰taęž‰ ikanaęž‰maęž‰ mo Kodaęž‰naęž‰ Kilu Tombuao Halaęž‰eki make ipikaęž‰ tikitiki piki hau make epenaęž‰ loluekemaęž‰ yeke titinaęž‰ ambaęž‰la weiyu haemekaęž‰naęž‰taęž‰ kotaęž‰ Kodaęž‰maęž‰ mo koto ikaęž‰ hone peleme ale manutaęž‰ iki anaęž‰lao ku halieke.
6.34: Koto ekinaęž‰taęž‰ belianaęž‰ kaęž‰ndaęž‰ manutaęž‰ ame kone na miaęž‰paęž‰peke. Belianaęž‰ kaęž‰ndaęž‰naęž‰ kaęž‰ndaęž‰taęž‰ beliaeki ipikaęž‰ ale homekee. Mandane nate manunaęž‰ kaęž‰ndaęž‰ manutaęž‰ ame do natenaęž‰ kaęž‰ndaęž‰ taapunaęž‰ apaęž‰taapeke na yaęž‰laęž‰me.

7.1: Kodaęž‰maęž‰ iki paęž‰taęž‰ pi yokaalu kiaapaęž‰naęž‰ ikanaęž‰maęž‰ make maęž‰ndaęž‰ paęž‰taęž‰ pi yokaalu na halaęž‰paęž‰peke.
7.2: Pa ekipeke ikanaęž‰maęž‰ mo mandane wandaęž‰hali paęž‰taęž‰ pi yokaalu pimikaęž‰naęž‰taęž‰ kotaęž‰ ikaęž‰ pi yokaalu pimi tupaęž‰taęž‰ Kodaęž‰maęž‰ make iki paęž‰taęž‰ mandake piki pi yokaalu kone kilieke. Kutupa ikanaęž‰maęž‰ maęž‰ndaęž‰ paęž‰taęž‰ mandaęž‰ mineme mandaęž‰maęž‰ kone Kodaęž‰maęž‰ iki make homeke mandaęž‰maęž‰ kone milieke.
7.3: Ekipeke nakaęž‰ kamenaęž‰ leke paęž‰taęž‰ ulaęž‰ dokolo siki hone wopu witolo hataęž‰taęž‰ mo nakaęž‰ leke paęž‰taęž‰ ulaęž‰ ti takaęž‰laęž‰pake tieketaęž‰ hone na u halepe.
7.4: Mo ti takaęž‰laęž‰pake tieke nakaęž‰ leke paęž‰taęž‰ pa winaęž‰ alo hataęž‰taęž‰ ekipa nakaęž‰ kame paęž‰taęž‰ Nakaęž‰ leke ulaęž‰ dokolo siki meanoe lelipikipe.
7.5: Aa yapi pi miki some. Titinaęž‰ mo nakaęž‰ leke ulaęž‰ ti takaęž‰laęž‰pake kiake ambaęž‰la mea baekaęž‰naęž‰taęž‰ kotaęž‰ mo nakaęž‰ kamenaęž‰ leke paęž‰taęž‰ ulaęž‰ dokolo siki mea waluekemaęž‰taęž‰ epeke handilipikie.
7.6: Ikaęž‰ Kodaęž‰ paęž‰taęž‰ haluekemaęž‰ wiaęž‰ haleme alemanu kika paęž‰taęž‰ na halaęž‰paęž‰peke. Pa ekipeke ikanaęž‰maęž‰ paa laęž‰kaęž‰la iki lu naamaęž‰naęž‰ loaęž‰me. Kutupa ikaęž‰ yenki tiekemaęž‰ hambeeke munduku teke manutaęž‰ mo maęž‰naęž‰naęž‰ leke paęž‰taęž‰ na lopa moneaapaęž‰peke. Kutu pimikaęž‰naęž‰taęž‰ kotaęž‰ koto munduku manutaęž‰ mo maęž‰naęž‰manu ikaęž‰ ankemaęž‰ pa tombua tombua piliekee. Honke alaęž‰eki Weitaęž‰laęž‰eki Kilikili laasaęž‰eki (Luku 11ęž‰9-13)
7.7: Honke lekaęž‰naęž‰taęž‰ kilieke. Weikaęž‰naęž‰taęž‰ handaęž‰ wilipikie. Kilikili laekaęž‰naęž‰taęž‰ mo neke paęž‰taęž‰ lombawalieke.

7.17: Kutaa make mandane ipi saosao liki timaęž‰taęž‰ epeke kilikimanu aęž‰iliaęž‰pate pa hakaęž‰teke timaęž‰taęž‰ hoke kilikimanu aęž‰ilieke.

3.6: Kutu pimikinaęž‰taęž‰ kotaęž‰ wandaęž‰hali paeyaomaęž‰ Kodaęž‰naęž‰ kitaęž‰laęž‰ daęž‰taęž‰laęž‰eki handilimikie laa laęž‰laęž‰me leekeme.
3.7: Koto dinaęž‰taęž‰ wandaęž‰hali wotumaęž‰ Dionimaęž‰ iki bapitaisi peaenaęž‰yeke paeyao epemekeme. Kutu pimiki handaa Dionimaęž‰ koto wandaęž‰hali paęž‰taęž‰ alotaęž‰ Ikitaęž‰ ketomanue. Ikitaęž‰ Kodaęž‰maęž‰ teke paęž‰taęž‰ epenaęž‰ lolo paęž‰laęž‰ mineke pankaęž‰laęž‰ ekitaęž‰ wonduluekemaęž‰ hamenaęž‰ laa maęž‰ndaęž‰ epitaęž‰ pindipa pelimiki pitaęž‰ epimaęž‰ kinki paęž‰laęž‰pe.
3.8: Ikaęž‰ pimi hoke haumanu paeyao ambaęž‰ hoki waleme ekinaęž‰ wandaęž‰halimaęž‰ handenaęž‰ mo epeke kiliki aęž‰elaęž‰ timaęž‰ paęž‰laęž‰eki pinaęž‰ epeke haumanu peaęž‰paęž‰peke. Koto ekinaęž‰taęž‰ ikanaęž‰maęž‰ Nikaęž‰ meitaęž‰ Eipolohaęž‰maęž‰e laa kutupiki pimanu na lapaęž‰peke laataęž‰ Dionimaęž‰ iki paęž‰taęž‰ alotaęž‰ Opuaęž‰pe. Kodaęž‰maęž‰ do toopimanu meaataęž‰ Eipolohaęž‰maęž‰naęž‰ mondu sembaęž‰lalaęž‰ wandaęž‰hali anaęž‰naęž‰ wepia haenaęž‰ lapeke yaęž‰laęž‰me alome.
3.9: Hande hapulaęž‰ ti manunaęž‰ teke paęž‰taęž‰ pokuluekemaęž‰ mandaęž‰ meaowaęž‰me leekeme. Epeke kiliki na aęž‰eyaęž‰laęž‰ timanu paeyao siki poko lopaotaęž‰ ti talo halaęž‰ paęž‰taęž‰ paeyao siki mu yankilieke leekeme.
3.10: Do pimanu opua mo wandaęž‰halimaęž‰ Dioni paęž‰taęž‰ lotaęž‰ pitolo hataęž‰ alotaęž‰ Kotaęž‰ nikanaęž‰maęž‰taęž‰ eki hau peomonope lemekeme.
3.11: Dionimaęž‰ ikaęž‰ pi hombo peaaso hataęž‰ alotaęž‰ Hali maęž‰ndaęž‰maęž‰ ipikaęž‰ dau yaapo wiaęž‰kaęž‰naęž‰taęž‰ kotaęž‰ maęž‰ndaęž‰taęž‰ mo dau diaęž‰yaęž‰laęž‰ natehali maęž‰ndaęž‰ paęž‰taęž‰ halaęž‰peke. Kutupa make ne napekeeki wiaęž‰kaęž‰naęž‰taęž‰ kotaęž‰ ne diaęž‰yaęž‰laęž‰ wandaęž‰halimanu paęž‰taęž‰ telipea halaęž‰paęž‰pekee leekeme.
3.12: Koto natenaęž‰taęž‰ mo mandane dakisi mani mu haemeke haliwekimaęž‰ Dionimaęž‰ iki bapitaisi peaenaęž‰ ipiki aęž‰pa lotaęž‰ pitolo alotaęž‰ Walaęž‰laęž‰ halio. Nikanaęž‰maęž‰taęž‰ eki hau piomonope laa lotaęž‰ pimikime.
3.13: Koto lemeke Dionimaęž‰ hombo peaaso alotaęž‰ Ikanaęž‰maęž‰ mo wandaęž‰halinaęž‰ dakisi mani mimikaęž‰naęž‰taęž‰ kotaęž‰ hakaęž‰taęž‰pao na miki mo Kapomaninaęž‰ Lo pimaęž‰ tombo ulaęž‰ tupaęž‰ miaęž‰paęž‰peke leekeme.
3.14: Mandane ami haliwekimaęž‰ make aęž‰pa lotaęž‰ pitolo hataęž‰ alotaęž‰ Nikanaęž‰maęž‰ make ekipiki haumanu peomonope lemekeme. Koto lemeke Dionimaęž‰ iki paęž‰taęž‰ alotaęž‰ Maęž‰ndaęž‰naęž‰ mani pake muluekemaęž‰ paalaęž‰ tiao o yayapiki ekinaęž‰ pa hameke laęž‰ tiaasaęž‰eki otaęž‰ na peaęž‰paęž‰peke. Kutupa ikaęž‰ e pokaasemeke kitaęž‰laęž‰ yenkitaęž‰ anaęž‰naęž‰ kitaęž‰laęž‰me hone wiaęž‰paęž‰peke leekeme.
3.15: Mo wandaęž‰halimaęž‰ koto haumanu paeyao handaataęž‰ ikaęž‰ puki paęž‰taęž‰ hayeke ale tialu baeyeke ekimaęž‰taęž‰ ikanaęž‰maęž‰ hone eleke eleke witolo hataęž‰taęž‰ do Dionitaęž‰ hande Ketiso pateyaęž‰laęž‰me laa hone wimikime.
3.16: Koto ekinaęž‰ Dionimaęž‰ iki paęž‰taęž‰ alotaęž‰ IĚ±maęž‰ ikitaęž‰ ikalimaęž‰ bapitaisi peao halopate hali maęž‰ndaęž‰ wetepenaęž‰ ipiliaęž‰ halitaęž‰ otaęž‰ honkopu wotu halaęž‰me. IĚ±taęž‰ ipiki yaapo anaęž‰ peaęž‰peke na yaęž‰laęž‰me. Ipikaęž‰ anke dake holaapeke make IĚ±taęž‰ anaęž‰ na paęž‰laęž‰me leekeme. Ipikanaęž‰maęž‰ ikitaęž‰ Holi Sipitidi pitaęž‰ ti uleke yaapomaęž‰ bapitaisi pealieke leekeme.
3.17: Ipikanaęž‰maęž‰ mo hande widi kilikinaęž‰ ambuku napeke yaapo putupa alu puluekemaęž‰ panaęž‰pulu paęž‰laęž‰ saęž‰sataęž‰ ipikaęž‰ kikinaęž‰ miniki halaęž‰me. Ipikaęž‰ widi kiliki epekeeki paeyaotaęž‰ ipikaęž‰ widi napeke u halaęž‰ da paęž‰taęž‰ mombaęž‰la wilieke. Pate mo ambuku paeyaotaęž‰ tinaęž‰ panaęž‰pu yankilieke. Koto titaęž‰ na paeyeke pa to halieke leekeme.
3.18: Mo wandaęž‰hali ikaęž‰ hoke haumanu hoki wala puki hone lekelenaęž‰yeke Dionimaęž‰ Kodaęž‰naęž‰ Pi Seliapomanu otaęž‰ epeke tupaęž‰ la halaęž‰tiki pominolo hataęž‰ wandaęž‰hali sutiatia puaęž‰tiki pomiekeme.
3.19: Koto paęž‰laęž‰pate Dionimaęž‰ mo kapomani hali tieke Hetodi paęž‰taęž‰ la halolo hataęž‰ alotaęž‰ Neketaęž‰ hoke haumanu peleme laa la haleekeme. Ekipeke. Hetodi ipikaęž‰ hamekenaęž‰ weteke Hetodiasi pa ipikaęž‰ handaęž‰mea make ipikanaęž‰maęž‰ ti teke wotu yokaęž‰tiki pomieke handa leekeme.
3.20: Koto leeke ekinaęž‰ Hetodi ipikanaęž‰maęž‰ Dioni dipula mea lopaeyeke ekimaęž‰taęž‰ mo ipikaęž‰ ambaęž‰ pieke hoke haumanu paeyaotaęž‰ koto ekimaęž‰ lu ankula yeekeme. Dionimaęž‰ Yesu bapitaisi peayekeeki (Maęž‰tiu 3ęž‰13-17, Maka 1ęž‰9-11)
3.21: Kutupa Dionimaęž‰ wandaęž‰hali paeyao siki bapitaisi hau peaotaęž‰ wetepe nane Yesu make bapitaisi hau peayekeme. Kutupa Yesumaęž‰ yeni pitolo haenaęž‰taęž‰ oli hepeni lumba
3.22: mo Holi Sipitiditaęž‰ ba melipumaęž‰ handekeeki holaęž‰paęž‰niao Yesunaęž‰ lokenaęž‰ aęž‰pa holopeekeme. Kutaa oli ya nanemaęž‰ pi hoĚ±laĚ±ęž‰make homekemaęž‰ pi alo alotaęž‰ Neketaęž‰ otaęž‰ yaka puki piki wekie. Yaka pukimaęž‰ neke paęž‰taęž‰ taęž‰naęž‰maęž‰ wotu homolome leekeme. Yesunaęž‰ apaęž‰meinaęž‰ bikimanu (Maęž‰tiu 1ęž‰1-17)
3.23: Yesu ipikaęž‰ bapitaęž‰ hali tieke homeke paeyao kiki yaapo bapimanu tupaęž‰ yeketaęž‰ ipikaęž‰ e kinipea pokeekeme. Mo wandaęž‰halimaęž‰ hone witolotaęž‰ ipikitaęž‰ Diosepenaęž‰ eiyekee hone wimikime. Diosepe ipikitaęž‰ Helinaęž‰ eiyeke hayekeme.

4.1: Yesutaęž‰ mo Diodani ikali minaęž‰paęž‰lao paa epeeke pitaęž‰maęž‰taęž‰ mo Holi Sipitidimaęž‰ ipiki paęž‰taęž‰ otaęž‰ tumbiekeme. Koto dinaęž‰taęž‰ mo hande Holi Sipitidimaęž‰ Yesutaęž‰ hapupapeke alenaęž‰ hatuku peekeme.
4.2: Koto paęž‰taęž‰taęž‰ nate hali tieke yaapo paęž‰taęž‰ Sadanimaęž‰ Yesu aęž‰pa la handaęž‰tiki piekeme. Koto hali tieke yaapo nate manunaęž‰taęž‰ Yesumaęž‰ alaęž‰taęž‰ maęž‰ndaęž‰ siki make otaęž‰ na neeke ekimaęž‰ teaęž‰maęž‰ homeekeme.
4.3: Kutupa Sadanimaęž‰ Yesu paęž‰taęž‰ alotaęž‰ Neketaęž‰ otaęž‰ Kodaęž‰naęž‰ Eiyeke yaęž‰kaęž‰naęž‰taęž‰ kotaęž‰ do toopi kone palaowa au lapeke leekeme.
4.4: Yesumaęž‰ mo Sadaninaęž‰ pi litolo hataęž‰ alotaęž‰ Mo Baibolomaęž‰ alotaęž‰ Halimaęž‰ palaowa homeke naa na hapeke yaęž‰laęž‰me laa laęž‰laęž‰me leekeme.
4.5: Kutupa mo Sadanimaęž‰ Yesu oli manda hatuku pua mo kenkenaęž‰ kilu tombuao halaęž‰ ekimanu paeyao siki ti tekele pea ipiki paęž‰taęž‰ waleekeme.
4.6: Kutu pitolo hataęž‰ mo Sadanimaęž‰ Yesu paęž‰taęž‰ alotaęž‰ Mo alemanu paeyaotaęž‰ IĚ± paęž‰taęž‰ kaęž‰laęž‰pate yaka honemaęž‰taęž‰ hali maęž‰ndaęž‰ paęž‰taęž‰ haloaęž‰kaęž‰naęž‰taęž‰ otaęž‰ anaęž‰ pilieke. Koto ekinaęž‰taęž‰ mo kilu tombuao halaęž‰ ekimanu paeyao pitaęž‰ ikaęž‰ hamoko alemanu paeyao telipinaęž‰ nakanaęž‰maęž‰ handeteke halenaęž‰ neke kuluekemaęž‰
4.7: neketaęž‰ ya biki laaluekemaęž‰ pandaęž‰ puniaekaęž‰naęž‰taęž‰ do alemanu paeyaotaęž‰ nakaęž‰eki yelieke leekeme.
4.8: Koto leeke Yesumaęž‰ alotaęž‰ Mo Baibolomaęž‰ dupa laęž‰laęž‰me. Tekehali nakaęž‰ Kodaęž‰ ipiki paęž‰taęž‰ homeke yeni pu hataęž‰ e poko hapeke laa laęž‰laęž‰me leekeme.
4.9: Pa mo Sadanimaęž‰ Yesu mo Diutuseleme nane yeni pu haemeke da tiekenaęž‰ holu manda hatuku pua haenaęž‰ leekeme. Kutupa Sadanimaęž‰ Yesu paęž‰taęž‰ alotaęž‰ Neketaęž‰ otaęž‰ Kodaęž‰naęž‰ Eiyeke yaęž‰kaęž‰naęž‰taęž‰ do alenaęž‰ hao oni kenkenaęž‰ nakaęž‰ kone lopaęž‰niae.
4.10: Kutu pikinaęž‰taęž‰ mo Baibolomaęž‰ laęž‰laęž‰ tupaęž‰ Kodaęž‰maęž‰ ipikaęž‰ enisolo tonumaęž‰ neke epeke tupaęž‰ handeteke haenaęž‰ laa pi lelieke laęž‰laęž‰me.
4.11: Kutupa mo Baibolomaęž‰ paa laęž‰laęž‰ tupaęž‰ Koto enisolo tonumaęž‰ toopi ponekemaęž‰ nakaęž‰ anke awaamaęž‰naęž‰yeke ikaęž‰ kiki manumaęž‰ neke miniliao handeteke halimikie laa laęž‰laęž‰me leekeme.
4.12: Koto leekepate Yesumaęž‰ ipikaęž‰ pi litolo hataęž‰ alotaęž‰ Baibolo pimaęž‰taęž‰ do laęž‰laęž‰me. Tekehali nakaęž‰ Kodaęž‰taęž‰ na la handaęž‰peke laa laęž‰laęž‰me leekeme.
4.13: Mo Sadanimaęž‰ Yesu paęž‰taęž‰ hoke la handaęž‰laęž‰ ekimanu ane mone eki paeyao siki peaataęž‰ pa hosiki minaęž‰paęž‰lao peekeme. Yesumaęž‰ ipikaęž‰ emanu kini piekeeki (Maęž‰tiu 4ęž‰12-17, Maka 1ęž‰14-15)
4.14: Mo Holi Sipitidinaęž‰ honkopumaęž‰ Yesu handeteke haenaęž‰ laa Yesu mo Kaęž‰lili nane paa peekeme. Kutupa koto da yu paeyao paęž‰taęž‰ haemeke wandaęž‰halimaęž‰ Yesunaęž‰ biki kende tupaęž‰ winaęž‰ lemekeme.
4.15: Ipikanaęž‰maęž‰ Kodaęž‰naęž‰ pi hotu haemeke damanu paęž‰taęž‰ puaęž‰tiki pea wandaęž‰hali paęž‰taęž‰ pi walaęž‰tiki pomieke handaataęž‰ mo wandaęž‰hali paeyaomaęž‰ ipikaęž‰ biki mea miniliatiki pimikime. Naęž‰saęž‰tete da wandaęž‰halimaęž‰ Yesu kiaemekeeki (Maęž‰tiu 13ęž‰53-58, Maka 6ęž‰1-6)
4.16: Kutupa Yesu ipikaęž‰ daeyeke da Naęž‰saęž‰tete da paęž‰taęž‰ pua ipikaęž‰ pu hayeke tupaęž‰ Diu wandaęž‰halinaęž‰ hoto pitu haemeke natenaęž‰ Kodaęž‰naęž‰ pi hotu haemeke da paęž‰taęž‰ peekeme. Kutupa ipikanaęž‰maęž‰ mo Baibolo buka yataęž‰puluekemaęž‰ yeke tiao hayekeme.
4.17: Hali maęž‰ndaęž‰maęž‰ mo Kodaęž‰naęž‰ potopede hali Aisayamaęž‰ wape pu wieke buka Yesu paęž‰taęž‰ haleekeme. Kotaęž‰ Yesumaęž‰ mo buka lombaataęž‰ handaęž‰tiki pua pi maęž‰ndaęž‰ dupa laeyekeeki handaęž‰ witolo hataęž‰ yataęž‰peekeme.
4.18: IĚ±maęž‰ natehali wandaęž‰hali paęž‰taęž‰manu mo Pi Seliapomanu laanoyeke mo IĚ± mea haenaęž‰ laęž‰laęž‰ Tekehalimaęž‰ ipikaęž‰ Sipitidi IĚ± yaapo halaęž‰me. Ipikanaęž‰maęž‰ IĚ± tapaalaęž‰ ekitaęž‰ mo dipula pilaęž‰ wandaęž‰hali ikitaęž‰ kaęž‰laęž‰paęž‰ tapao halememe lono make mo leke holupiki wandaęž‰hali ikitaęž‰ ikaęž‰ leke manumaęž‰ paa handilimikie laa lonoyeke tapaalaęž‰me. 7.19: Nikaęž‰ tapake wandaęž‰hali paęž‰taęž‰ ipikanaęž‰maęž‰ makeatiki pea puki tandamaęž‰ homaatiki piekeme. Panake hambaęž‰ mea mendimiki wekisunu da paęž‰taęž‰ na mondu wia pitinaęž‰ leke pa hamaęž‰ nane homenaęž‰yeke mondu batiki pinaęž‰ leekeme.

14.22: Ketiso wandaęž‰hali honkopu haenaęž‰ alo hataęž‰ pi walolo alotaęž‰ Pi wotu miniki hao hapaęž‰pekealeo laataęž‰ Nikitaęž‰ kaęž‰ndaęž‰maęž‰ homaęž‰laęž‰eki wotu meataęž‰ Kodaęž‰ ipikaęž‰ Kilu Tombuao Halaęž‰ ekinaęž‰ hondaęž‰ pambulumeke lepekeme.
14.23: Polo Banabasi yaapomaęž‰ mo siosi tapake handeteke haenaęž‰ tondiki haliweki tambaęž‰ mipi peaataęž‰ kutupa ne na neke yeni pitolo hataęž‰ mo hande Kodaęž‰ paęž‰taęž‰ hone tulaasaęž‰ wandaęž‰hali Kodaęž‰maęž‰ handeteke haenaęž‰ lepekeme.
14.24: Kutupa Pisidia nane pua lombei pupa Paęž‰mbilia nane opolo pepekeme.
14.25: Kutupa Peka da paęž‰taęž‰ pi walakaęž‰naęž‰ Aęž‰talia da nane puniaepekeme.
14.26: Kutupa koto hao palai kawasonaęž‰ pita hande Aęž‰ndioko da paęž‰taęž‰ pepekeme. Koto dataęž‰ ambaęž‰ kone mo Kodaęž‰naęž‰ aęž‰taęž‰maęž‰ homaęž‰laęž‰eki minolo hataęž‰ ipikaęž‰ pi walenaęž‰yeke tapaemeke haliweki paęž‰taęž‰taęž‰ pi wala paeyeke handa paa opolo epepekeme.
14.27: Kutupa opolo aęž‰paataęž‰ siosi tapake wandaęž‰hali mombelenaęž‰ laataęž‰ Kodaęž‰maęž‰ Diendaili wandaęž‰halimaęž‰ pi minaęž‰yeke potaęž‰ lombeekeeki make walepekeme.
14.28: Kutupa mo Ketiso wandaęž‰hali ameĚ±leĚ± hao hatiki pimikime.

15.1: Kutupa mandane Diudia nane haemeke haliwekimaęž‰ koto paęž‰taęž‰ hao holaęž‰paęž‰nini pea aęž‰pa Ketiso wandaęž‰hali paęž‰taęž‰ pi walolo alotaęž‰ Mo hande Mosesimaęž‰ waleeke sekemesaisi hau na pimikaęž‰naęž‰taęž‰ ikitaęž‰ deto halaęž‰ ekitaęž‰ na milimikie laa lemekeme.
15.2: Koto lemeke ekinaęž‰ Polo Banabasi yaapomaęž‰ mo haliweki ameĚ±leĚ± kaęž‰ndaęž‰piki pi tieke lepeketaęž‰ hande Aęž‰ndioko Ketiso tapake haliwekimaęž‰ Polo Banabasi yaapo make mandane haliwekimaęž‰ mo Diutuseleme haemeke aposolo haliweki paęž‰taęž‰ make mo handeteke haemeke tondiki haliweki paęž‰taęž‰ make hande walemeke pi hotulu penaęž‰yeke mimikime.
15.3: Koto ekinaęž‰ mo siosi tapakemaęž‰ tapaemeketaęž‰ pua mo Pinisia nane make Sametia nane make pomu lopa mo Diendaili wandaęž‰halimaęž‰ Kodaęž‰ paęž‰taęž‰ puki laęž‰kaęž‰laemekeeki walolo hataęž‰ koto pimaęž‰ mo Ketiso wandaęž‰hali paeyaotaęž‰ taęž‰naęž‰maęž‰ homaemekeme.
15.4: Kutupa Diutuseleme da paęž‰taęž‰ opolo pemeketaęž‰ mo aposolo haliweki make tondiki haliwekimaęž‰ make mo siosi wandaęž‰halimaęž‰ make taęž‰naęž‰maęž‰ homolo hataęž‰ iki handaęž‰ mimikime. Kutupa Kodaęž‰maęž‰ ipiliki paęž‰taęž‰ pieke ekimanu paeyao walepekepate
15.5: mandane Paęž‰tisi tapake Ketiso haliwekimaęž‰ tiao alotaęž‰ Mo wandaęž‰halitaęž‰ sekemesaisi hau pinaęž‰ laataęž‰ Mosesimaęž‰ waleeke Lo Pimanu make opinaęž‰ laataęž‰ anaęž‰ paęž‰laęž‰me lemekeme.
15.6: Mo hande aposolo haliweki make tondiki haliweki ameĚ±leĚ± mo hande lotaęž‰ pieke ekinaęž‰ mombelemekeme.
15.7: Pi wotu hotu haotaęž‰ Pidamaęž‰ tiao alotaęž‰ Ya kametitio. Ambaęž‰ kone iki ameĚ±leĚ± hano Kodaęž‰maęž‰ IĚ± mea haenaęž‰ laataęž‰ Diendaili wandaęž‰hali paęž‰taęž‰ mo hande Pi Seliapo walonoyeke paęž‰laęž‰me. Mo wandaęž‰halimaęž‰ pi opuakaęž‰naęž‰ hone tulaenaęž‰yeke paęž‰laęž‰me.
15.8: Kutupa wandaęž‰halinaęž‰ puki tukiki nane hando halaęž‰ Kodaęž‰maęž‰taęž‰ Diendaili wandaęž‰halimaęž‰ hone tulaasemeeki aęž‰paęž‰laęž‰me la walolo hataęž‰ niki paęž‰taęž‰ kaęž‰laęž‰ tupaęž‰ iki paęž‰taęž‰ make Holi Sipitidi haleekeme.
15.9: Kutu pieke ekimaęž‰ ipikanaęž‰maęž‰taęž‰ niki Diu wandaęž‰hali make iki Diendaili wandaęž‰hali make taęž‰taęž‰ taęž‰taęž‰ pea na halomaęž‰eki waleekeme. Ikaęž‰ hone tulaemeke ekinaęž‰ ipikanaęž‰maęž‰ ikaęž‰ hoke haumanu pa paeyaeyekeme.
15.10: Koto ekinaęž‰ Kodaęž‰maęž‰ paęž‰laęž‰eki handa kone ametaęž‰ pa ekipeke Kodaęž‰ la handuluekemaęž‰ hone witelemepe. Nikaęž‰ apaęž‰meimaęž‰ make nikanaęž‰maęž‰ kone make meaęž‰peke na yeke kaęž‰ndaęž‰ paęž‰laęž‰eki kone pa ekipeke mo hande hone tulaaseme wandaęž‰hali paęž‰taęž‰ kaęž‰ndaęž‰maęž‰ homenaęž‰ alemepe.
15.11: Diaęž‰me laataęž‰ Nikanaęž‰maęž‰ hone tulaasomaęž‰ ekitaęž‰ Kodaęž‰maęž‰ Tekehali Yesu ipikaęž‰ pa aęž‰taęž‰maęž‰ homaęž‰laęž‰ ekimaęž‰ niki daęž‰taasaęž‰me. Diendaili wandaęž‰hali daęž‰taaso pitaęž‰laęž‰ tupaęž‰ pitaęž‰laęž‰me.
15.12: Banabasi Polo yaapomaęž‰taęž‰ Kodaęž‰maęž‰ ipiliki paęž‰taęž‰ wele pitaęž‰laęž‰eki halaataęž‰ mo na hando haemeke ekimanu make wele pieke ekimanu make mo Diendaili wandaęž‰hali paęž‰taęž‰ pieke ekimanu walolo haenaęž‰taęž‰ mo mombelemeke haliwekimaęž‰ opitolo hataęž‰ pi na leke yopu pitimikime.
15.13: Pi lo paeyaepeketaęž‰ Diaęž‰mesimaęž‰ ipilikaęž‰ pi hombo peaaso alotaęž‰ Ya kametitio. IĚ±maęž‰ alo pi opuaęž‰pe.
15.14: Kodaęž‰maęž‰ mo Diendaili wandaęž‰hali paęž‰taęž‰ mandane ekimanu otaęž‰ ipikaęž‰ wandaęž‰hali talopu mea haenaęž‰ laęž‰laęž‰ ekimaęž‰ iki paęž‰taęž‰ ipikaęž‰ epeke hone witaęž‰laęž‰eki niki walaęž‰laęž‰me. Saimonomaęž‰ koto la kaęž‰laęž‰me.
15.15: Mo hande potopede haliwekimaęž‰ lemeke pi manutaęž‰ otaęž‰ mandake pimanu laęž‰laęž‰me. Hande Baibolo bukamaęž‰ laęž‰laęž‰ tupaęž‰
15.16: Tekehalimaęž‰ alotaęž‰ Doeki paeyaęž‰kaęž‰naęž‰taęž‰ kotaęž‰ IĚ± paa aęž‰pataęž‰ Deipidinaęž‰ howa ulaęž‰ da IĚ±maęž‰ paa mea aęž‰pa aęž‰meiyalueke. Koto da taake paęž‰taęž‰ kone IĚ±maęž‰ paa epeao mea haenaęž‰ lolueke.
15.17: Kutupa mo mandane mandane wandaęž‰hali paeyaomaęž‰taęž‰ Tekehali weilimikie. Hande IĚ±maęž‰ wi lolo Diendaili wandaęž‰halitaęž‰ otaęž‰ yakaeki haenaęž‰ lolome leekeme.
15.18: Tekehalimaęž‰ ambaęž‰ kone dupiki pi la halaataęž‰ koto alaęž‰ handaęž‰e leekeme.
15.19: Diaęž‰mesimaęž‰ pa alo alotaęž‰ Yaka honemaęž‰taęž‰ Kodaęž‰ paęž‰taęž‰ laęž‰kaęž‰laęž‰ mina haleme Diendaili wandaęž‰halitaęž‰ nikanaęž‰maęž‰ kaęž‰ndaęž‰maęž‰ homaęž‰laęž‰eki na halomanaęž‰ peaęž‰paęž‰peke alee.
15.20: Diaęž‰me. Wape maęž‰ndaęž‰ pea dupiki pi la halomanaęž‰ peaęž‰paęž‰peke alee. Mo toopi timaęž‰ wepia ulaęž‰ kodaęž‰manu paęž‰taęž‰ lia haleeke maęž‰naęž‰ mindiki napeke na yeke suseke hau na piki make waęž‰kaęž‰taęž‰pa litaęž‰laęž‰ maęž‰naęž‰ yeti na neke we make na napaęž‰peke laa lomanaęž‰ peaęž‰paęž‰peke alee.
15.21: Mosesimaęž‰ Lo Pi manutaęž‰ mo pi hotu haleme da paęž‰taęž‰manu hataęž‰taęž‰ Hoto Pilaęž‰ Nate paeyaonaęž‰ kone yataęž‰paęž‰tiki pu haemekeme. Kutupa make daoni paeyao paęž‰taęž‰manu ipikaęž‰ pimanu walaęž‰tiki pu halememe laa leekeme. Mo Diendaili Ketiso wandaęž‰hali paęž‰taęž‰ wape tapaemekeeki
15.22: Koto paęž‰laęž‰ ekinaęž‰ mo aposolo haliweki make mo tondiki haliweki make siosi wandaęž‰hali paeyao ameĚ±leĚ± ikanaęž‰maęž‰ iki paęž‰taęž‰ mandane haliweki talopu mea haenaęž‰ laataęž‰ Polo Banabasi yaapo ameĚ±leĚ± hataęž‰taęž‰ mo Aęž‰ndioko da paęž‰taęž‰ tapaaluekemaęž‰ hone wimikime. Diudasi biki maęž‰ndaęž‰ Basabasi meataęž‰ Sailasi make talopu mea haenaęž‰ lemekeme. Mo Ketiso wandaęž‰halimaęž‰ koto hali yaapo paęž‰taęž‰ epeke hone u haemekeme.
15.23: Kutupa do wapetaęž‰ mo haliwekimaęž‰ mea penaęž‰ lemekeme. Koto pase tukiki paęž‰taęž‰ do pi wiekeme. Nikitaęž‰ aposolo haliwekimaęž‰ mo siosinaęž‰ handeteke halomaęž‰ tondiki haliwekimaęž‰ tonkaęž‰naęž‰ ikaęž‰ kametonu hataęž‰ do wapemaęž‰ nikaęž‰ oli Aęž‰ndioko Sitia Silisia nane haleme Diendaili kametiti paęž‰taęž‰ keiyae alomaęž‰me.
15.24: Nikaęž‰ da nane haliweki mandaneeki manumaęž‰ pi walolo hataęž‰ iki kaęž‰ndaęž‰ peaemeke ekitaęž‰ opumaęž‰me. Nikanaęž‰maęž‰ dupa lapaęž‰peke pi na lomaęž‰pate pa ikaęž‰ konemaęž‰ iki kaęž‰ndaęž‰maęž‰ homaemekeme.
15.25: Koto ekinaęž‰ nikanaęž‰maęž‰ mombaęž‰la hataęž‰ Mandane haliweki mumanaęž‰e laa koto haliweki nikaęž‰ epeke kame yaapo Banabasi Polo ameĚ±leĚ± iki paęž‰taęž‰ tapaomaęž‰kaęž‰naęž‰taęž‰ epelieke lomaęž‰me.
15.26: Hande hali yaapomaęž‰taęž‰ Tekehali Yesu Ketiso paęž‰taęž‰ hone wopu witolo hataęž‰ ipilikaęž‰ lokenaęž‰ hau hone wopu na wiki homeke nono pea haepekeme.
15.27: Koto ekinaęž‰ Diudasi Sailasi yaapo iki paęž‰taęž‰ tapaasomaęž‰me. Kutupa ipilikanaęž‰maęž‰ kakemaęž‰ hande pi kone lelipipikie lemekeme.
15.28: Mo Holi Sipitidimaęž‰ make nikaęž‰ honemaęž‰ make iki paęž‰taęž‰ kaęž‰ndaęž‰maęž‰ na homaake pa do pimanu siki homeke aęž‰paęž‰laęž‰maęž‰ opuaęž‰pe alomaęž‰me.
15.29: Toopi timaęž‰ wepia ulaęž‰ ale paęž‰taęž‰ lia halemeke hoteke ne alaęž‰taęž‰ alaęž‰taęž‰ na neke we make na neke mo daęž‰kaęž‰pe miniki hataęž‰ homaasaęž‰eki na neke loke hoeyaasaęž‰ hau na piki kutupa koto haumanu na pimikaęž‰naęž‰taęž‰ epeke tupaęž‰ halimikie alomaęž‰me. Aęž‰taloe laa wape pu paeyaęž‰me.
15.30: Kutupa mo tapaemeke haliweki oni Aęž‰ndioko da nane puaataęž‰ Ketiso wandaęž‰hali aęž‰pa mombelenaęž‰ laakaęž‰naęž‰ hande pase halemekeme.
15.31: Kutupa yataęž‰pakaęž‰naęž‰taęž‰ hande manaęž‰ lemekeeki opuaataęž‰ taęž‰naęž‰maęž‰ homemekeme.
15.32: Kutupa Diudasi Sailasi yaapo potopede hali yaapo hataęž‰ kone pi wopu walolo hataęž‰taęž‰ honkopu haenaęž‰ lepekeme.
15.33: Kutupa koto paęž‰taęž‰ hosiki hao hatiki pipikitaęž‰ mo Ketiso haliwekimaęž‰ hande titinaęž‰ ambaęž‰ kone tapaemeke haliweki paęž‰taęž‰ epeke tupaęž‰ hataęž‰ paa tapaemekeme.
15.34: [Pate Sailasinaęž‰ honemaęž‰taęž‰ do paęž‰taęž‰ pa halueke hone wiekeme.]
15.35: Kutu pimikipate Polo Banabasi yaapo Aęž‰ndioko da nane hao haotaęž‰ haliweki paeyao ameĚ±leĚ± hataęž‰ Tekehalinaęž‰ pi latiki peataęž‰ walaęž‰tiki pu haemekeme. Polo Banabasi yaapo kaęž‰taęž‰alu pea taęž‰taęž‰ taęž‰taęž‰ pipikieki
15.36: Kutupa nate mandaneeki hao Polomaęž‰ Banabasi paęž‰taęž‰ alotaęž‰ Panaęž‰e ambaęž‰ hande Tekehalinaęž‰ pi walopaęž‰ da ninaęž‰ wandaęž‰halitaęž‰ eki paęž‰laęž‰pe laa handopanaęž‰ panaęž‰e leekeme.
15.37: Kutupa Banabasimaęž‰ Dioni Maka hatuku poluekemaęž‰ hone wiekepate
15.38: Polomaęž‰taęž‰ hone na wiekeme. Hande Paęž‰mbilia da nane hataęž‰ pi walo poluekemaęž‰ hone na wiki ipiliki minaęž‰paęž‰laeyeke handa anaęž‰ na paęž‰laęž‰me leekeme.
15.39: Kutupa ipilikaęž‰ pi taęž‰taęž‰ taęž‰taęž‰ pea kaęž‰ndaęž‰maęž‰ homepeke handa potaęž‰ maęž‰ndaęž‰naęž‰ maęž‰ndaęž‰ pea potaęž‰ maęž‰ndaęž‰naęž‰ maęž‰ndaęž‰ pea pepekeme. Banabasimaęž‰ Maka ameĚ±leĚ± pita palai kawasonaęž‰ Saipotasi nane pepekepate
15.40: Polomaęž‰ Sailasi meaataęž‰ Ketiso haliwekimaęž‰ Kodaęž‰naęž‰ aęž‰taęž‰maęž‰ homaęž‰laęž‰eki minaęž‰yeke tapaemekeme.
15.41: Kutupa puataęž‰ Sitia Silisia yaapo nane siosi wandaęž‰hali honkopu haenaęž‰ alo hataęž‰ pomu haepekeme.

16.1: Kutupa mo Debi Lisita da yaapo nane opolo epepekeme. Ketiso hali homeke Timodi koto paęž‰taęž‰ hayekeme. Ipikaęž‰ inkikitaęž‰ Diu wandaęž‰maęž‰ kone pi miniki hayeke wandaęž‰naęž‰ eiyeke hayekepate ipikaęž‰ ateketaęž‰ Kitiki hali hayekeme.
16.2: Mo Lisita Aikoniomo da yaaponaęž‰ Ketiso wandaęž‰halimaęž‰ Timodi ipikaęž‰ pi lao haemekeme.
16.3: Polomaęž‰ ipikaęž‰ honemaęž‰taęž‰ Timodi yaapo poluekemaęž‰ mo some meaataęž‰ sekemesaisi hau peaeyekeme. Mo da ninaęž‰ haemeke Diu haliwekimaęž‰ Timodinaęž‰ ateketaęž‰ Kitiki halie laa handemeke handa peaeyekeme.
16.4: Mo daoni paęž‰taęž‰manu pomu lopolo hataęž‰ hande Diutuseleme aposolo haliwekimaęž‰ make handeteke haemeke tondiki haliwekimaęž‰ make lemeke pi manutaęž‰ mo Ketiso wandaęž‰halimaęž‰ hone winaęž‰yeke la halaęž‰tiki pimikime.
16.5: Koto ekinaęž‰ mo hande siosi tapake manumaęž‰ hande pi minaęž‰laęž‰ ekinaęž‰ honkopu honkopu hao nate paeyao daeyaemekeme. Polomaęž‰ upamaęž‰ piki nono piekeeki
16.6: Kutupa mo Pitikia Kaęž‰leisia nane yaapo lombei pupa pemekepate mo Holi Sipitidimaęž‰ mo Eisia nane pi na walenaęž‰ leekeme.
16.7: Kutupa Maisia nane teke paęž‰taęž‰ opolo epemekepate Bidinia nane poluekemaęž‰ pu handemekepate Yesu ipikaęž‰ Sipitidimaęž‰ saęž‰saęž‰ piekeme.
16.8: Kutupa Maisia da nane nepoko nanemaęž‰ pakaęž‰lao puaataęž‰ lombei pupa puataęž‰ Dotoaęž‰si da nane holaęž‰paęž‰niaemekeme.
16.9: Timba upamaęž‰ piki nono pea Polomaęž‰ hali maęž‰ndaęž‰ handeekeme. Maęž‰sedonia hali homekemaęž‰ ipiki paęž‰taęž‰ honke alo hataęž‰ alotaęž‰ Maęž‰sedonia nane niki tambaęž‰ mulu aęž‰paęž‰peke laa leeke some homeke handeekeme.
16.10: Kutupa hande upamaęž‰ piki nono pikieki handaataęž‰ Kodaęž‰maęž‰ hande Pi Seliapo koto wandaęž‰hali paęž‰taęž‰ walomono leaęž‰me hone witolo hataęž‰ mo Maęž‰sedonia nane poluekemaęž‰ kuta kone potaęž‰ weimikime. Pilipai wandaęž‰ Lidiamaęž‰ hone laęž‰kaęž‰laęž‰ mina wiekeeki
16.11: Dotoaęž‰si da minaęž‰paęž‰laotaęž‰ palai kawasonaęž‰ pitaęž‰ mo Saęž‰moteisi da nane tikitikinaęž‰ opolo puaataęž‰ nate maęž‰ndaęž‰naęž‰ Niaęž‰polisi da nane opolo pomaęž‰me.
16.12: Koto paęž‰taęž‰ hao minaęž‰paęž‰laotaęž‰ mo Maęž‰sedonia nane teke da Pilipai da nane opolo pomaęž‰me. Koto da paęž‰taęž‰ make Lomaęž‰ haliweki wopu haemekeme. Koto daoni paęž‰taęž‰ nate mandaneeki haotaęž‰
16.13: kutupa Hoto Pilaęž‰ Nate ninaęž‰ mo daoninaęž‰ potaęž‰ kake tieke paęž‰taęž‰ tunkulupa pua ikali teaęž‰ nane pomaęž‰me. Nikaęž‰ honemaęž‰taęž‰ koto alenaęž‰taęž‰ yeni pu halaęž‰ alenaęž‰ hone wiaataęž‰ kutupa pitiniao koto paęž‰taęž‰ aęž‰pa mombelemeke wandaęž‰weki paęž‰taęž‰ pi pi lomaęž‰me.
16.14: Wandaęž‰ homeketaęž‰ Lidiamaęž‰ mo Daetaeda daoni nane wandaęž‰ aęž‰pa wepiki alemanu hambo hatiki pinaęž‰ laataęž‰ Kodaęž‰ paęž‰taęž‰ pandaęž‰puniao yeni pu haotaęž‰ nikaęž‰ pi opiaęž‰me. Polomaęž‰ waleeke pi opinaęž‰yeke Tekehalimaęž‰ mo wandaęž‰naęž‰ puki laęž‰kaęž‰laeyekeme.

Kutupa koto paęž‰laęž‰ ekitaęž‰ Kodaęž‰maęž‰ nikaęž‰ Tekehali Yesu Ketisomaęž‰ peaenaęž‰ leekeme.

6.1: Koto polomaęž‰ ekinaęž‰ nikanaęž‰maęž‰ eki pi lolumaęž‰pe. Kodaęž‰maęž‰ pa hameke aęž‰taęž‰maęž‰ homaęž‰laęž‰eki daeyaęž‰tia penaęž‰yeke nikanaęž‰maęž‰ hoke haumanu pa pu tia pomanaęž‰pe.
6.2: Aęž‰paęž‰e. Diaęž‰me. Hoke hau pitaęž‰laęž‰eki paęž‰taęž‰ nikitaęž‰ ambaęž‰ homomaęž‰me. Ekipeke paa putia puaęž‰tiki pumanaęž‰pe.

6.4: Koto bapitaisi pumaęž‰ ekitaęž‰ ipiki yaapo mandakenaęž‰ homa pa lapaęž‰ paęž‰taęž‰ make mandake umaęž‰me. Panake hau pu hataęž‰ haluekemaęž‰ bapitaisi pumaęž‰me. Hande nikaęž‰ Apaęž‰maęž‰ ipikaęž‰ honkopu halaęž‰eki epekemaęž‰ Ketiso paa mea daęž‰taeyeke tupaęž‰ pitolomaęž‰me.

6.14: Hande Lo Pi manunaęž‰ dupaęž‰pe laa walaęž‰laęž‰eki ikaęž‰ wenoko tikitikinaęž‰ na mea wikitaęž‰ hande Kodaęž‰naęž‰ pa aęž‰taęž‰maęž‰ homaęž‰laęž‰eki homeke ikaęž‰ wenoko tikitikinaęž‰ mea winaęž‰ aleme ekinaęž‰ kotaęž‰ hoke hau pitaęž‰laęž‰ ekimaęž‰ iki paa aęž‰ndaęž‰ na lu tombuaenaęž‰ lapaęž‰pekema. 7.1: Kame tonuo. Ikanaęž‰maęž‰ mo hande Lo Pimanu opueleme ekinaęž‰ IĚ±maęž‰ ame do lolo polo pitaęž‰ hone wilimikie. Hali maęž‰ndaęž‰maęž‰taęž‰ pa hataęž‰taęž‰ mo hande Lo Pimanu dupie alaęž‰ ekitaęž‰ opuaęž‰peke yaęž‰laęž‰me.

Hande Lo Pi manumaęž‰ wandaęž‰halimaęž‰ hoke hau pinaęž‰ lo halaęž‰eki
7.7: Koto paęž‰laęž‰ ekinaęž‰ nikanaęž‰maęž‰ eki pi lolumaęž‰pe. Hande Lo Pi manutaęž‰ hokeekie lolumaęž‰pe. Aęž‰paęž‰e. Diaęž‰me. Koto paęž‰laęž‰pate hande Lo Pi manumaęž‰taęž‰ IĚ±maęž‰ hoke hau pitoloeki handonoyeke paęž‰laęž‰me. Hande Lo Pi manumaęž‰ alotaęž‰ Taęž‰taęž‰naęž‰ ale muluekemaęž‰ we na pambaęž‰peke laęž‰laęž‰pate pa kutupiki pi na leaęž‰kaęž‰naęž‰ yolutaęž‰ mo taęž‰taęž‰naęž‰ ale muluekemaęž‰ we pambaęž‰laęž‰ ekitaęž‰ IĚ±maęž‰ hone wopu na ulu puaęž‰me.

3.4: Kutaa make ikanaęž‰maęž‰ yankeke kone linaęž‰ maęž‰naęž‰ yapaęž‰ mu aęž‰ndaęž‰ lombo make homaęž‰laęž‰ ale teke na hake haumanu pu make ikaęž‰ honemaęž‰ ikitaęž‰ tieke halomaęž‰me hone witolo hataęž‰ Kodaęž‰ pukimaęž‰ na homeketaęž‰ pa ikaęž‰ loke taęž‰naęž‰ peaasaęž‰ alemanu paęž‰taęž‰ pukimaęž‰ homo halememe.
3.5: Ikanaęž‰maęž‰ mo Kodaęž‰ paęž‰taęž‰ yeni pitaęž‰laęž‰ hautaęž‰ pa peaęž‰tiki peaęž‰tiki pu halemepate mo yeninaęž‰ wele pitaęž‰laęž‰ ekitaęž‰ hoki walaa kiaaso halememe. Kutu piki wandaęž‰hali ameĚ±leĚ± apaęž‰tao na hapeke.
3.6: Kutu piki mandane haliwekimaęž‰taęž‰ mandane hone wopu na wiki wandaęž‰weki homu pealuekemaęž‰ ikaęž‰ da paęž‰taęž‰ yopu siki hondaęž‰ pamba pu halememe. Kutu piki wandaęž‰weki ikaęž‰ hoke hau manumaęž‰taęž‰ ikaęž‰ honemanu kaęž‰ndaęž‰ peaotaęž‰ ikaęž‰ lokenaęž‰ hoke hone paęž‰laęž‰eki manumaęž‰ iki yolaęž‰ mea aneya moneya pu halaęž‰me.
3.7: Do koto wandaęž‰wekimaęž‰taęž‰ mo pimanu opua hone uluekemaęž‰ taapemekepate pa mo otaęž‰ pinaęž‰ teketaęž‰ miniki hapaęž‰peke na yaęž‰laęž‰me.
3.8: Mo hande Diaęž‰nisi pitaęž‰ Diaęž‰mbitisi yaapomaęž‰ Mosesi paęž‰taęž‰ aęž‰ndaęž‰ lipikime. Koto some yaapomaęž‰ pipiki tupaęž‰ kone mo hande haliwekimaęž‰taęž‰ mo hande otaęž‰ pi paęž‰taęž‰ make aęž‰ndaęž‰ lu halememe. Ikanaęž‰maęž‰ ikaęž‰ hone tikitiki na yaaso hataęž‰ kone Kodaęž‰ paęž‰taęž‰ hone tulaapeke ekinaęž‰taęž‰ iki anaęž‰ na paleke handaataęž‰ Kodaęž‰maęž‰ iki kiao halaęž‰me.
3.9: Koto haliweki ikaęž‰ hautaęž‰ wopu na daeyalieke. Mo ambaęž‰ haemeke wandaęž‰halimaęž‰ mo hande Diaęž‰nisi Diaęž‰mbitisi yaaponaęž‰ pambaęž‰ na piki hau pipikieki handolo pimiki tupaęž‰ ame make wandaęž‰halimaęž‰ koto haliwekinaęž‰ pambaęž‰ na piki haumanu handilimikie. Paeyaaso manaęž‰ pi
3.10: Pate nakanaęž‰maęž‰ IĚ± yaapo neke mandake pomi pitaęž‰maęž‰taęž‰ mo hande wandaęž‰hali paęž‰taęž‰ waloaęž‰ pi manutaęž‰ nakanaęž‰maęž‰ ambaęž‰ opua hone wilime. Kutaa ya hau pitaęž‰ ya puaęž‰eki yaapotaęž‰ nakanaęž‰maęž‰ hone wilime. Kutaa IĚ±maęž‰ ya hone tulaaloeki make wandaęž‰halimaęž‰ pi minaęž‰ sokaęž‰laęž‰maęž‰ homa na kiake pa handeteke haloeki make ya aęž‰taęž‰maęž‰ homa pukimaęž‰ homoloeki make kaęž‰ndaęž‰manu epenaęž‰ kone IĚ±maęž‰ honkopu hao daĚ±oĚ±la haloeki make nakanaęž‰maęž‰ handeleme.
3.11: Mandane haliwekimaęž‰ IĚ± lu yombu moneao halemeke make tanda wopunaęž‰ moneao haloeki make handeme. Mo hande Aęž‰ndioko da paęž‰taęž‰ make Aikoniomo da paęž‰taęž‰ make kutaa Lisita da paęž‰taęž‰ make do da tepo haliwekimaęž‰ IĚ± otaęž‰ hoeyaęž‰ hau lu yombu haenaęž‰ kone pa takaęž‰lao haowaęž‰ ekitaęž‰ nakaęž‰ hone wilime. Kutu pimipate kone mo Tekehalimaęž‰ do koto hau paeyaonaęž‰ tukiki paęž‰taęž‰ kone IĚ± wopu paęž‰taęž‰laęž‰ moneao hayaęž‰me.
3.12: Aowe. Koto tupaęž‰ kone mandane wandaęž‰hali epimaęž‰ Ketiso Yesu paęž‰taęž‰ taęž‰maęž‰ni pea hataęž‰ Kodaęž‰naęž‰ pi tolu haemekaęž‰naęž‰taęž‰ kotaęž‰ iki paęž‰taęž‰taęž‰ mandane haliwekimaęž‰ mo hoeyaęž‰ hapu lu yombuaęž‰laęž‰ haumanu pilimikie.
3.13: Hoke hau pu halaęž‰ haliweki make yayapiki hau pitaęž‰laęž‰ haliweki make ikaęž‰ ikaęž‰ kone makea alu alu pitolo hataęž‰ ikaęž‰ hoke hau manutaęž‰ otaęž‰ mea daeyalimikie.
3.14: Kutu pu halimipate neketaęž‰ hande waleeke opi otaęž‰ pimanu wopu miniki hale ekitaęž‰ na minaęž‰paęž‰lapeke. Hande neke waleaęž‰ tapaketaęž‰ nakaęž‰ hone wilime.
3.15: Kutaa make mo hande Yakopiki Baibolonaęž‰ wape pea ulaęž‰ pi manutaęž‰ neke wekisiki hataęž‰ kone kini pea opuaęž‰tiki aęž‰pa ame make paa opuolo haleme. Nakanaęž‰maęž‰ mo Ketiso Yesu paęž‰taęž‰ hone tulaaseeki paęž‰taęž‰ yamaęž‰ meaęž‰peke daęž‰taasaęž‰eki muelenaęž‰ u tiaasaęž‰ honetaęž‰ do Baibolonaęž‰ wape pea ulaęž‰ pi manumaęž‰ kaęž‰laęž‰me.
3.16: Mo Baibolonaęž‰ wape pea ulaęž‰ pi paeyao wape pinaęž‰taęž‰ haliwekinaęž‰ hone paęž‰taęž‰ Kodaęž‰maęž‰ walaęž‰ tiaaso haenaęž‰ wape pimikime. Koto wape paęž‰laęž‰ pimaęž‰taęž‰ wandaęž‰hali paęž‰taęž‰ otaęž‰ pimanu waluekemaęž‰ make hoke hau peaamaęž‰naęž‰ saęž‰saęž‰ puluekemaęž‰ make hoi piki haumanu tondepealuekemaęž‰ make kutupa epeke hapeke ekinaęž‰ manaęž‰manu loluekemaęž‰ wape pea ulaęž‰me.
3.17: Kutu peaapeke yaęž‰laęž‰ ekimaęž‰taęž‰ mo Kodaęž‰naęž‰ e pokaasaęž‰ somemaęž‰ epeke hau paeyao anaęž‰naęž‰ peaenaęž‰ tikitiki yao haenaęž‰ lelieke.

4.1: Mo pa haleme wandaęž‰hali pitaęž‰ ambaęž‰ homemeke wandaęž‰hali pea telipulu paęž‰laęž‰ Ketiso Yesu pitaęž‰ Kodaęž‰ yaaponaęž‰ leke popelekenaęž‰ telepo pi na alopate Ketisotaęž‰ mo wandaęž‰halinaęž‰ handeteke hao halo paęž‰laęž‰ Kini hali ipiliekeyeke ya pukimaęž‰ kaęž‰ndaęž‰maęž‰ homolo haenaęž‰ IĚ±maęž‰ neke paęž‰taęž‰ dupaęž‰pekee alome.
4.2: Kodaęž‰naęž‰ pi walo hapeke. Kutu polo halenaęž‰ wandaęž‰halimaęž‰ opuluekemaęž‰ taęž‰naęž‰maęž‰ na homolo haenaęž‰ make o taęž‰naęž‰maęž‰ homa opitolo haenaęž‰ make na kiaake pa walolo walolo ombu hapeke. Nakanaęž‰maęž‰ mo puki nalaęž‰ pimaęž‰ make mineke pimaęž‰ make kutupa mo hone u tiaasaęž‰ pimaęž‰ make koto pi manumaęž‰ ikanaęž‰maęž‰ epeke honemanu winaęž‰ loluekemaęž‰ taęž‰naęž‰maęž‰ homaęž‰ tiaaso handeteke hao hapeke.
4.3: Wandaęž‰halimaęž‰ mo epeke manaęž‰ pi wopu na opulu paęž‰laęž‰ nate make ipilieke. Kutaa make wandaęž‰halimaęž‰ ikaęž‰ hone paęž‰laęž‰ ekimanu pitolo hataęž‰ ikaęž‰ opulueke hone peleme pimanu la halaęž‰peke yolo paęž‰laęž‰ haliwekimaęž‰ iki handeteke haenaęž‰ handaęž‰ meaęž‰tiki pilimikie.
4.4: Ikanaęž‰maęž‰ pa tindemanu homeke opuluekemaęž‰ mo otaęž‰ pitaęž‰ na opiki hoki walaa kiaalimikie.
4.5: Kutu pinaęž‰ kone neke paęž‰taęž‰ ekipiki haumanu epenaęž‰ kone kotaęž‰ koto ekimaęž‰ neke hoeyaamaęž‰naęž‰ nakaęž‰ hone lu tombua tombua pitolo hataęž‰ hapeke. Kaęž‰ndaęž‰manu epenaęž‰ kone daĚ±oĚ±la hataęž‰kaęž‰naęž‰ mo Pi Seliapo walaęž‰laęž‰ hali hataęž‰ e poko hapeke. Kutupa neketaęž‰ Kodaęž‰naęž‰ e pokaasaęž‰ hali hataęž‰ nakaęž‰ kaęž‰laęž‰ e poko hapeke.
4.6: IĚ± paęž‰taęž‰ epolo paęž‰laęž‰ hautaęž‰ dupa. Mo hande hoteke lia halaęž‰laęž‰ tupaęž‰ IĚ± lu peleme natetaęž‰ teke paęž‰taęž‰ yaęž‰laęž‰me. IĚ± do kenkenaęž‰ haloeki paeyaalo polo nate teke paęž‰taęž‰ yaęž‰laęž‰me.
4.7: IĚ±taęž‰ mo hotoneli kitaęž‰laęž‰ ekinaęž‰taęž‰ ya wele paeyaomaęž‰ epeke tupaęž‰ aĚ±iĚ±ya pua mo tombo epeke tupaęž‰ watao halome. Kutupa make mo ya Kodaęž‰ paęž‰taęž‰ hone tulaalo ekitaęž‰ na minaęž‰paęž‰lalome.
4.8: Koto ekinaęž‰ mo tikitiki pea haeme wandaęž‰halimaęž‰ ikaęž‰ lombei pimiki ekinaęž‰ meaęž‰peke yenki tieketaęž‰ IĚ±maęž‰ putupiliki miono yeke pa ulaęž‰me. Do koto ya lombei polo ekinaęž‰ yenkitaęž‰ mo Tekehali nikaęž‰ tikitiki teli peaasaęž‰ halimaęž‰ mo epolo paęž‰laęž‰ nate tiekenaęž‰ IĚ± paęž‰taęž‰ kilieke. Koto yenkitaęž‰ IĚ± paęž‰taęž‰ homeke na kulu paęž‰laęž‰pate pa mo mandane ipiki peneme yaenaęž‰ yeke pukimaęž‰ homolo handeteke hao haleme wandaęž‰hali paęž‰taęž‰ tonkaęž‰naęž‰ halieke. Polonaęž‰ ale manunaęž‰ pimanu
4.9: Nakanaęž‰maęž‰ koto kone IĚ± paęž‰taęž‰ aĚ±iĚ± ipuluekemaęž‰ taapo hapeke.
4.10: Dimasitaęž‰ do kenkenaęž‰ haunaęž‰ hone wopu pieke ekimaęž‰ IĚ± na leeke minaęž‰paęž‰lao mo Desalonaika da nane pua halaęž‰me. Ketesinisitaęž‰ Kaęž‰leisia kenke nane pua halaęž‰me. Taitasitaęž‰ mo Daęž‰lemeisia kenke nane pua halaęž‰me.
4.11: Luku homeke homeke IĚ± yaapo halopaęž‰me. Neke ipulu hataęž‰taęž‰ Maka handaęž‰ muaęž‰tiki aęž‰paęž‰peke. Ipikanaęž‰maęž‰ IĚ± tambaęž‰ minaęž‰ yeke loaęž‰me.
4.12: Tikikasitaęž‰ Epesese nane tapaowaęž‰me.
4.13: Ya kosaęž‰ dautaęž‰ mo Todoaęž‰si da halaęž‰ hali Kapusimaęž‰ wia hawaenaęž‰ epoaęž‰maęž‰ neke ipulu hataęž‰taęž‰ meaęž‰tiki aęž‰paęž‰peke. Ya bukamanu tonkaęž‰naęž‰ mea aęž‰paaso hataęž‰taęž‰ mo hande hoteke yonkelekemaęž‰ waęž‰paęž‰laęž‰ buka manutaęž‰ otaęž‰ hone na yonkaęž‰lapeke.
4.14: Mo kepete kawai wepu halaęž‰ hali Aęž‰lekesaęž‰ndamaęž‰ IĚ± paęž‰taęž‰ hoke hau tieke piekeme. Koto ipikaęž‰ pieke haunaęž‰ yenkitaęž‰ Tekehalimaęž‰ anaęž‰naęž‰ halieke.
4.15: Mo somemaęž‰ nikaęž‰ walolomaęž‰ pinaęž‰ aęž‰ndaęž‰ wopu liaęž‰me. Kutu pieke handaa neke make hoeyaamaęž‰naęž‰maęž‰ wopu handeteke hapeke.
4.16: Mo pi yokaalu pumaęž‰ natenaęž‰taęž‰ IĚ±maęž‰ ya puaęž‰ haumanu waluekemaęž‰ titinaęž‰ hombo peaowaęž‰ dinaęž‰taęž‰ mo IĚ± tambaęž‰ minaęž‰laęž‰ hali paeyao homeke aęž‰ndaęž‰ na hake iki paeyaomaęž‰ IĚ± minaęž‰paęž‰lao pememe. Kodaęž‰maęž‰ ikaęž‰ pimi hoke hautaęž‰ hone yonkaęž‰laenaęž‰e.
4.17: Kutu pimipate mo Tekehalimaęž‰ IĚ± teke paęž‰taęž‰ hataęž‰ IĚ± wele peayaęž‰me. Kutu piaęž‰ ekimaęž‰taęž‰ mo pi na miki wandaęž‰hali paeyaomaęž‰ opinaęž‰ IĚ±maęž‰ mo Pi Seliapo epeke tupaęž‰ waloaęž‰me. Kutaa make mo laionimaęž‰ IĚ± lu nenaęž‰ taapolo pimikieki teke paęž‰taęž‰ yaęž‰naęž‰ mo Tekehalimaęž‰ IĚ± peteleaęž‰me.
4.18: Mo Tekehalimaęž‰ mo hande hoke hau paeyao paęž‰taęž‰ IĚ± yokaęž‰ mea ipikaęž‰ hepeni nane Kilu Tombuao Halaęž‰ ekinaęž‰ epeke tupaęž‰ opolo aęž‰pono lelieke. Mo biki yeiyaęž‰ laasaęž‰eki paeyao ipiki paęž‰taęž‰ na paeyeke pa u haenaęž‰e. Kutu pinaęž‰e. Paeyaaso pimanu
4.19: Mo Pisila Akuila yaapo paęž‰taęž‰ make mo Onesipotasinaęž‰ tapake paęž‰taęž‰ tonkaęž‰naęž‰ ya aęž‰talo pi tapaasome.
4.20: Etaęž‰situsi ipikitaęž‰ Kotindi da nane hayaęž‰me. Totobimasi yeni hayeke handaa Mailitasi da paęž‰taęž‰ haenaęž‰ epoaęž‰me.
4.21: Mo kosaęž‰ ki aĚ±iĚ± na epeke haenaęž‰ kone IĚ± paęž‰taęž‰ aĚ±iĚ± ipuluekemaęž‰ taapo hapeke. Yubulisi Pudenisi Linusi Kolodia make mo mandane Ketiso tapake paeyaomaęž‰ ikaęž‰ aęž‰talo pi neke paęž‰taęž‰ tapaasememe.
4.22: Mo Tekehalitaęž‰ nakaęž‰ temoko yaapo hao haenaęž‰e. Kodaęž‰naęž‰ aęž‰taęž‰maęž‰ homa tambaęž‰ minaęž‰laęž‰eki make iki paeyao ameĚ±leĚ± hao haenaęž‰e.

1.1: IĚ±taęž‰ Polomaęž‰ Kodaęž‰naęž‰ e pokaasaęž‰ hali hataęž‰ make Yesu Ketisonaęž‰ aposolo hali hataęž‰ make do wape wapitolome. IĚ±taęž‰ mo Kodaęž‰maęž‰ maĚ±leke lilaęž‰ wandaęž‰halinaęž‰ hone tulalemeeki daeyaenaęž‰ lono ipikanaęž‰maęž‰ IĚ± mea tapaeyaęž‰me. Kuta make ikaęž‰ pi miniki haasaęž‰ haunaęž‰ otaęž‰ pitaęž‰ miniki haenaęž‰ walonoyeke IĚ± tapaeyaęž‰me.
1.2: Ikaęž‰ mo koto hone tulalemeeki make mo otaęž‰ pi miniki halemeeki make do hau yaapotaęž‰ mo deto halaęž‰ haunaęž‰ ti laasaęž‰eki paęž‰taęž‰ ti lalememe. Mo yayapiki pi na lo halaęž‰ Kodaęž‰maęž‰ ambaęž‰ mo alaęž‰taęž‰ alaęž‰taęž‰ paeyao na wepia winaęž‰ leke do deto halaęž‰ ekitaęž‰ niki paęž‰taęž‰ hone witolo hataęž‰ pi laęž‰ wiekeme.
1.3: Koto hoki nanetaęž‰ mo yapekeyeke nate opolo epeke pitaęž‰maęž‰taęž‰ mo koto deto halaęž‰ ekitaęž‰ ipikaęž‰ pi walaasaęž‰ haliwekimaęž‰ walemeke pimaęž‰ peneme yaeyekeme. Koto kaęž‰laęž‰ pitaęž‰ IĚ±maęž‰ walawano mo nikaęž‰ daęž‰taasaęž‰ Kodaęž‰maęž‰ peae laęž‰leke walaasome.
1.4: Koto ekinaęž‰ do wapetaęž‰ mo Taitasi paęž‰taęž‰ wape tapaasome. Mo dikaęž‰ hone tulaalope ekinaęž‰ ipikitaęž‰ otaęž‰ ya weki halaęž‰me. Mo Apaęž‰ halaęž‰ Kodaęž‰maęž‰ make mo nikaęž‰ daęž‰taasaęž‰ Ketiso Yesumaęž‰ make neke paęž‰taęž‰ aęž‰taęž‰maęž‰ homa tambaęž‰ minaęž‰laęž‰eki pitaęž‰ puki lopao haasaęž‰eki yaapo kinaęž‰e la alome. Siosi you haliwekinaęž‰ manaęž‰ pi
1.5: Nakanaęž‰maęž‰ niki na pumaęž‰ ekimanu tikitiki yao epeaotaęž‰ mo siosi tapake handeteke halo peleme haliweki make mo daoni paeyao paęž‰taęž‰ haenaęž‰ lolenaęž‰yeke neke hae laa pomaęž‰me. Neke mo Kotiti ikali hoki tukikinaęž‰ minaęž‰paęž‰lao poaęž‰ ekitaęž‰ do ekinaęž‰ puaęž‰me. IĚ±maęž‰ hande dupa piaęž‰peke loaęž‰ ekitaęž‰ hone wiaęž‰peke.
1.6: Mo handeteke halo paęž‰laęž‰ halitaęž‰ moeki aęž‰ndaęž‰ na paęž‰laęž‰ hali make wandaęž‰ homeke maęž‰laęž‰ halimaęž‰ hapeke yelieke. Kutupa make ipikaęž‰ wekiwandikitaęž‰ mo pi miniki hataęž‰ ikitaęž‰ ti teke yokaęž‰laęž‰ wekiwandikie o ateke inkikinaęž‰ pi yokaęž‰laęž‰ wekiwandikie laa ikaęž‰ biki na wiaęž‰kaęž‰naęž‰taęž‰ hapaęž‰peke yelimikie.
1.7: Ipikanaęž‰maęž‰taęž‰ Kodaęž‰naęž‰ hau handeteke hapeke ekinaęž‰ ipikitaęž‰ otaęž‰eki aęž‰ndaęž‰ na piki hali hapeke yelieke. Ipikitaęž‰ wandaęž‰hali lu pambaake pi lo o mineke aĚ±iĚ± koto kone pankaęž‰laęž‰ o hoke ikali naa keao o wandaęž‰hali make alaęž‰taęž‰ alaęž‰taęž‰ hoeyao tekipuleke lao o IĚ± IĚ± laa pasaęž‰tei pu o dupiki haumanu pu haliaęž‰ halitaęž‰ hapeke na yelieke.
1.8: Ipikaęž‰ da paęž‰taęž‰taęž‰ kimisu wandaęž‰hali pambolo opolo pinaęž‰ alaęž‰ hali make epeke hau pitaęž‰laęž‰ ekitaęž‰ taęž‰naęž‰maęž‰ homa hone wotu witaęž‰laęž‰ hali make ipikaęž‰ hone paęž‰taęž‰ kone anaęž‰e alaęž‰ hali make tikitikinaęž‰ halaęž‰ hali make yakopiki hali make ipikaęž‰ loke handeteke halaęž‰ hali make hapeke yelieke.
1.9: Kuta make ipikitaęž‰ mo hande ti lao hapeke yaęž‰laęž‰ otaęž‰ pi walaęž‰laęž‰eki daĚ±oĚ±la miniki hapeke yelieke. Kutu pilie ekimaęž‰taęž‰ mandane wandaęž‰hali paęž‰taęž‰ otaęž‰ tupaęž‰ walolo hataęž‰ tambaęž‰ meaęž‰peke yelieke. Kutupa make mo hande otaęž‰ tupaęž‰ walaęž‰laęž‰ pimanu pa tupaęž‰ alo hataęž‰ kiaaseme wandaęž‰hali tikitiki yaasaęž‰ hali hapeke yelieke. Makeaasaęž‰ haliweki haemekeeki
1.10: Haliweki wopumaęž‰ otaęž‰ pi kiaaso hataęž‰ mo ikaęž‰ pa hameke pi manumaęž‰ mandane wandaęž‰hali makeao halememe. Kutupiki pi lo haleme mandane haliwekitaęž‰ mo pa sekemesaisi pu haleme Diu tapake haemeke tapakemaęž‰ kone lo halememe.
1.11: Kutupiki yalaęž‰ meaęž‰peke haumanu piteleme hautaęž‰ pa yanaaso hataęž‰ wandaęž‰halinaęž‰ manimanu muluekemaęž‰ pitelememe. 4.12: Ya yankeke tonuo. Mo iki la handaęž‰laęž‰ ti talaęž‰ ekimaęž‰ handeke tanda minelemeeki handataęž‰ dotaęž‰ taęž‰taęž‰ piki kaęž‰ndaęž‰ yaęž‰kaęž‰taęž‰me lataęž‰ na penkili peaęž‰paęž‰peke.

4.16: koto kaęž‰ndaęž‰taęž‰ meaęž‰paęž‰peke na yaęž‰laęž‰pate mo Ketisonaęž‰ wandaęž‰hali halemeke handa kaęž‰ndaęž‰ mimikaęž‰naęž‰taęž‰ koto kaęž‰ndaęž‰ minelemeeki paęž‰taęž‰ yaalaęž‰maęž‰ na homeketaęž‰ iki Ketisonaęž‰ biki miniki haleme ekinaęž‰ Kodaęž‰ paęž‰taęž‰ keiyae pi lo hapaęž‰peke.

5.1: Iki ameĚ±leĚ± halaęž‰ you hali weki paęž‰taęž‰ IĚ± make you hali hataęž‰ iki paęž‰taęž‰ tikitiki yaasaęž‰ pi alome IĚ±taęž‰ Ketisonaęž‰ tanda miekeeki handoaęž‰ halie. Kutupa mo epolo paęž‰laęž‰ paĚ±aĚ± pitaęž‰laęž‰ ekitaęž‰ IĚ±maęž‰ make mulueke.
5.2: Ikanaęž‰maęž‰ handeteke hamenaęž‰ Kodaęž‰maęž‰ kaęž‰laęž‰ sipisipi maęž‰naęž‰taęž‰ taęž‰naęž‰maęž‰ homolo hataęž‰ handeteke hapaęž‰peke. Kimaęž‰ na homeke Kodaęž‰maęž‰ hone paęž‰laęž‰ tupaęž‰ handeteke hapaęž‰peke. Do e pokaęž‰laęž‰ ekitaęž‰ yenki homekenaęž‰ hone na wiki ikaęž‰ honemaęž‰ kone hone pitolo haenaęž‰ pokaęž‰paęž‰peke.
5.3: Ikanaęž‰maęž‰ handeteke hamenaęž‰ kaęž‰laęž‰ wandaęž‰halitaęž‰ tumbaaluekemaęž‰ na tapeke ikanaęž‰maęž‰ pu halimi epeke hau manumaęž‰ mo sipisipi maęž‰naęž‰manu wala tiaaso hataęž‰ hapaęž‰peke.
5.4: Kutupa mo sipisipi maęž‰naęž‰ handeteke halaęž‰ Titinaęž‰ Hali opolo epeaęž‰kaęž‰naęž‰taęž‰ ipikanaęž‰maęž‰ iki paęž‰taęž‰ mo paĚ±aĚ± na alu pulu paęž‰laęž‰ namba otaęž‰ seliapo pikieki kiaęž‰kaęž‰naęž‰ milimikie. Hone tikitiki yao homu pea hapaęž‰pekeeki
5.5: Koto mandake tupaęž‰ kone iki panake panake haliwekimaęž‰ make mo keileke haliweki paęž‰taęž‰ homu pea hao hapaęž‰peke. 5.6: Koto ekinaęž‰taęž‰ ikanaęž‰maęž‰ Kodaęž‰naęž‰ wele wopu piki kiki oto paęž‰taęž‰ hataęž‰ homu pea hao hapaęž‰peke. Kotaęž‰ kototaęž‰ ipikaęž‰ hone piliaęž‰ di ninaęž‰ ipikanaęž‰maęž‰ iki mea aęž‰meiyalieke.
5.7: Ipikanaęž‰maęž‰ iki paęž‰taęž‰ hone wopu u halaęž‰ ekinaęž‰ ikaęž‰ witeleme hone eleke eleke paeyao ipiki paęž‰taęž‰ lopa moneaęž‰paęž‰peke.
5.8: Leke leke lo hataęž‰ aęž‰ndaęž‰ ipulaęž‰eki handoemenaęž‰ potaęž‰ pua tunkulu hapaęž‰peke. Ikaęž‰ aęž‰ndaęž‰ tunkiliki hali Sadanimaęž‰ mo sayale hali maęž‰naęž‰ tiekemaęž‰ handa wandaęž‰hali lia noluekemaęž‰ wei mea pomu halaęž‰me.
5.9: Mo kenke paeyaonaęž‰ ikaęž‰ Ketiso tapake wandaęž‰halimaęž‰ mandake tupaęž‰ tanda minelemeeki make hone wia hataęž‰taęž‰ Kodaęž‰ paęž‰taęž‰ hone wotu tulao hataęž‰ Sadani pendulu baapaęž‰peke.
5.10: Kodaęž‰maęž‰taęž‰ pa aęž‰taęž‰maęž‰ homaęž‰laęž‰ Tekehali hataęž‰ iki Ketiso ameĚ±leĚ± taęž‰maęž‰ni pea hamenaęž‰ ipikaęž‰ nate paeyao paĚ±aĚ± pu halaęž‰eki muemenaęž‰yeke iki ambaęž‰ wi laęž‰laęž‰me. 5.12: Do dokaęž‰tiki tameiyaęž‰taęž‰ Silipanisi ya kame teke paęž‰taęž‰ ekimaęž‰ wape peaenaęž‰ wape pea puaęž‰me. 1.1: IĚ±taęž‰ Saimono Pida mo hande Yesu Ketisonaęž‰ e pokaasaęž‰ make aposolo halimaęž‰ loaęž‰me. Mo hande niki daęž‰taasaęž‰ Kodaęž‰ Yesu Ketisonaęž‰ tikitiki hau pitaęž‰laęž‰eki paęž‰taęž‰ yamaęž‰ hone tulaalaęž‰eki halaęž‰laęž‰ ekitaęž‰ nikaęž‰ hande otaęž‰ seliapo piki ekimaęž‰ handekeeki meleme wandaęž‰hali paęž‰taęž‰ do tameiyaęž‰ tapaasome.
1.2: Aęž‰taęž‰maęž‰ homolo tambaęž‰ minaęž‰laęž‰eki make puki lopaęž‰niaasaęž‰eki make otaęž‰ tumbulu baasaęž‰ ekitaęž‰ Kodaęž‰ make nikaęž‰ Tekehali Yesu ipilikaęž‰ honemanu yamaęž‰ ikaęž‰ eki winaęž‰e. Kodaęž‰naęž‰ wi alaęž‰eki pitaęž‰ maĚ±leke litaęž‰laęž‰eki yaapo
1.3: Kodaęž‰naęž‰ welepiki otaęž‰ ekimaęž‰taęž‰ daęž‰taęž‰laęž‰eki pitaęž‰ tikitiki piki hau yaapo mulu polomaęž‰ hau paeyao anaęž‰naęž‰ kaęž‰laęž‰me. Do hau manutaęž‰ mo ipikaęž‰ paĚ±aĚ± make epeke hau yaapomaęž‰ niki wi laęž‰laęž‰ Kodaęž‰ hone umaęž‰eki paęž‰taęž‰ yamaęž‰ anaęž‰naęž‰ molomaęž‰me.
1.4: Dupitaęž‰laęž‰ haumaęž‰taęž‰ ipikanaęž‰maęž‰ mo laęž‰ ulaęž‰ otaęž‰ aneke make seliapo piki pa hameke halaęž‰laęž‰ alemanu kaęž‰laęž‰me. Pa ekipeke. Dupiki pa hameke halaęž‰laęž‰ ale manumaęž‰taęž‰ mo hande do kenkenaęž‰ ulaęž‰ hoeyaasaęž‰ puki tiaasaęž‰ hau mea pakaęž‰lao mo Kodaęž‰naęž‰ otaęž‰ hau paęž‰taęž‰ aęž‰pa apaęž‰taalimikie.
1.5: Doeki tekenaęž‰taęž‰ ikaęž‰ hone tulaasemeeki paęž‰taęž‰ mo otaęž‰ epeke hau apaęž‰taaluekemaęž‰ honkopu hapaęž‰peke. Kutupa ikaęž‰ otaęž‰ epeke hau paęž‰taęž‰taęž‰ hone wilimieki apaęž‰taapaęž‰peke.
1.6: Koto ikaęž‰ hone wilimieki paęž‰taęž‰taęž‰ mo ikaęž‰ kone loke hone yaapo lu tumbao haleme hau apaęž‰taapaęž‰peke. Kutupa koto loke hone yaapo lu tumbao halemeeki paęž‰taęž‰taęž‰ puki hanaęž‰ nokaęž‰pelemeeki apaęž‰taapaęž‰peke. 1.7: Kutupa ikaęž‰ Kodaęž‰naęž‰ hau leke piteleme hau paęž‰taęž‰taęž‰ kame paęž‰taęž‰ taęž‰naęž‰maęž‰ homelemeeki apaęž‰taapaęž‰peke. Kutupa kame paęž‰taęž‰ taęž‰naęž‰maęž‰ homeleme hau paęž‰taęž‰taęž‰ maęž‰ndaęž‰ paęž‰taęž‰ pukimaęž‰ homelemeeki apaęž‰taapaęž‰peke.
1.8: Do seliapo piki hau manutaęž‰ otaęž‰ ikanaęž‰maęž‰ wia hapaęž‰peke yaęž‰laęž‰ haumanue. Kutupa ikanaęž‰maęž‰ do haumanu mea tumbulu bao wia haemekaęž‰naęž‰taęž‰ kotaęž‰ koto ale manumaęž‰taęž‰ ikaęž‰ mo nikaęž‰ Tekehali Yesu Ketiso paęž‰taęž‰ hone witeleme ekitaęž‰ wele putiaasaęž‰ honkopu kilieke.
1.9: Koto paęž‰laęž‰pate maęž‰ndaęž‰ epimaęž‰ do ekimanu na wia hayaęž‰kaęž‰naęž‰taęž‰ kotaęž‰ koto sometaęž‰ leke otaęž‰ dokaęž‰tiki yaalo hataęž‰ handaęž‰peke na yaęž‰laęž‰me. 1.10: Koto ekinaęž‰ yaka kame titio. Mo Kodaęž‰maęž‰ iki wi laa maĚ±leke litaęž‰laęž‰ ekitaęž‰ otaęž‰ pa u haenaęž‰ ikanaęž‰maęž‰ honkopu wopu hao peaęž‰paęž‰peke. Kutu pimikaęž‰naęž‰taęž‰ ikaęž‰ hone tulaleme ekitaęž‰ otaęž‰ na minaęž‰paęž‰lalimikie.
1.11: Dupimikaęž‰naęž‰taęž‰ ikitaęž‰ mo nikaęž‰ Paęž‰taęž‰laęž‰laęž‰ Tekehali Yesu Ketisonaęž‰ na paelo paęž‰laęž‰ Kilu Tombuao halaęž‰eki paęž‰taęž‰ hondaęž‰ pamboemenaęž‰ waleke tieke kilieke.
1.12: Kutupa ikanaęž‰maęž‰taęž‰ ambaęž‰ meleme otaęž‰eki paęž‰taęž‰ honkopu hao hapaęž‰lia hataęž‰ do alo pimanu ambaęž‰ hone wilimipate IĚ±maęž‰ do hau manutaęž‰ iki paęž‰taęž‰ paa opuaaso ombu halueke.
1.13: Yaka honemaęž‰taęž‰ IĚ± pa halo anetaęž‰ IĚ±maęž‰ peaęž‰pekeeki homeketaęž‰ do hau manunaęž‰ ikaęž‰ ambaęž‰ wilimi honemanu paa hone u tiatiki pulueke.

1.16: Mo hande nikaęž‰ Tekehali Yesu Ketisonaęž‰ wele paęž‰taęž‰ ipulaęž‰ ekitaęž‰ nikanaęž‰maęž‰taęž‰ pa maęž‰ndaęž‰maęž‰ ipikaęž‰ hone paęž‰taęž‰ waęž‰paęž‰laęž‰ tameni manunaęž‰ tilao hataęž‰ iki paęž‰taęž‰ walolo na lomaęž‰me. Otaęž‰ nikaęž‰ lekemaęž‰ ipikaęž‰ honkopu tieke handomaęž‰me.

IĚ±maęž‰ ipiki paęž‰taęž‰ taęž‰naęž‰maęž‰ wopu homolome laa pi laęž‰niaeyaęž‰me.
1.18: Otaęž‰ nikanaęž‰maęž‰ kone mo pi hoĚ±laĚ±ęž‰make oli hepeni nanemaęž‰ epeaęž‰eki opumaęž‰me. Nikitaęž‰ ipiki ameĚ±leĚ± mo hande yako piki potenaęž‰ haomaęž‰ dinaęž‰ loaęž‰me.
1.19: Koto ekinaęž‰ nikitaęž‰ mo hande potopede haliwekimaęž‰ walo haemeke pinaęž‰ hone wopu tulalomaęž‰me. Ikanaęž‰maęž‰ make koto pi wopu opimikaęž‰naęž‰taęž‰ otaęž‰ epeke tupaęž‰ pilimikie. Pa ekipeke koto pitaęž‰ hande lamepamaęž‰ timbaęž‰ leke ale paęž‰taęž‰ paĚ±aĚ± peatia pua mo da kaęž‰laęž‰polo hataęž‰ da kaęž‰laęž‰paaso hombulankaęž‰maęž‰ ikaęž‰ puki paęž‰taęž‰ paĚ±aĚ± peaasaęž‰ nate opolo haenaęž‰ minaęž‰paęž‰laasaęž‰ tupaęž‰e.
1.20: Titinaęž‰ pitaęž‰ dupamaęž‰ hone u hapaęž‰peke Maęž‰ndaęž‰maęž‰ ipikaęž‰ honemaęž‰ kone mo Baibolo paęž‰taęž‰ laęž‰ ulaęž‰ pi maęž‰ndaęž‰naęž‰ teketaęž‰ pa na walaęž‰peke yaęž‰laęž‰me.
1.21: Pa ekipeke mo laęž‰ wieke pi maęž‰ndaęž‰taęž‰ halinaęž‰ hone paęž‰taęž‰ na epeekepate mo haliwekitaęž‰ Holi Sipitidimaęž‰ handeteke hayekeeki oto paęž‰taęž‰ hataęž‰ Kodaęž‰maęž‰ haleeke tupaęž‰ walao haemekeme.
